Not only was he a national leader, he was a noted writer and journalist and left a legacy in print of political science such as a history of the Republican Movement in Europe amongst other works.

The monument features a stone base with figures on all four sides. On the main side, facing southwards, is the bronze figure of Emilio Castelar, and at his feet lies a marble Venus, an allegory to the truth. Flanking him on either side are two classical public speakers, Cicero and Demosthenes who observe and listening to Castelar.

Like many great monuments in Madrid, this sits in the middle of a roundabout in a very busy road. I didn't even try to get closer. The monument is really out of the way of the main tourist areas. While it's definitely worth a look, only do so if you have a bit of time in Madrid","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1Iabaw&fid=0x0:0x234303e313ffeb9d"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"Kelloggs Frosties","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW9AE8vHKv8U3ElHYJOz7qZMynWG1jbYGPapp07kCS_RDg75Ys=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Located in the middle of a roundabout on the Paseo de la Castellana, this monument is dedicated to the historian, journalist, academic, public speaker and politician from Cadiz, Emilio Castelar Ripoll.

It is a complex work by Mariano Benlliure. It is a stone base that allows figures to be placed on each of its sides. On the main side, facing southwards, we can find the bronze figure of Emilio Castelar, and at his feet lies a marble Venus, an allegory to the truth, towards which the bronze figures of a worker, a soldier and a student rise, representing Work, Effort and Study. On the opposite side, there are two classical public speakers: Cicero and Demosthenes who observe and listen to Castelar. Finally, at the rear, there is a bronze relief dedicated to Castelar’s speeches in favour of the abolition of slavery in the former Spanish colonies.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Arteaga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXNEsluXXj7svw9Md2msUadIeb26Fz6d4eNqB3ac_6CM9FnE81BOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must see. [{"Name":"Jai Arr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6oGFmfWzsps2Ux3EaJ9qeSYQGJp6-IDoJdjmuF679ew0iuukA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As an Pinoy I had to check it out. It’s a great monument for Dr Rizal.  Commemorating the diplomatic relations between the Spanish Kingdom and the Republic of the Philippines.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCg0pHJlQE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-2-15"},{"Name":"Bon Salinas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjViqqrKvJioc0TQjAxptdC16_YoIS5bL7tUuTDNTs7DuGFRKzhUIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"**A Monument of Reconciliation: Spain Honors José Rizal in Madrid**

In a powerful gesture of reconciliation and historical reflection, the Spanish government has unveiled a monument dedicated to José Protasio Rizal, the Philippines' national hero, in the heart of Madrid. This act of recognition comes over a century after Rizal's execution by Spanish colonial authorities in 1896, a moment that marked a turning point in the Philippines' struggle for independence.

The monument, a striking bronze sculpture of Rizal, stands tall in a prominent Madrid plaza, symbolizing a bridge between two nations with a shared, albeit complex, history. Rizal, a polymath, writer, and revolutionary, advocated for reform and peaceful resistance against colonial oppression. His writings, particularly *Noli Me Tangere* and *El Filibusterismo*, exposed the injustices of Spanish rule and inspired a movement for freedom.

The Spanish government's decision to honor Rizal reflects a commitment to acknowledging the past while fostering a spirit of mutual respect and understanding. Spanish officials emphasized that the monument is not just a tribute to Rizal's legacy but also a recognition of the enduring ties between Spain and the Philippines. "This monument is a symbol of our shared history and a step toward healing," said a spokesperson during the unveiling ceremony.

For Filipinos, the monument is a poignant reminder of Rizal's enduring influence and a testament to the power of forgiveness and progress. It also serves as a reminder that history, though often painful, can be a foundation for building stronger, more respectful relationships.

As the sun sets over Madrid, the monument to José Rizal stands as a beacon of hope, reminding us that even the most divided histories can find common ground in the pursuit of truth and reconciliation.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAlNj81QE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-2-9"},{"Name":"Chelsea Janes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVi5RYgdJVjosZ1bfo8yRHkVR5BmsCP-H6gForcoflp1a0oA-8B=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very interesting to see Rizal in Spain, especially since it was the Spanish colonists who murdered him. Obviously, though, there is no mention of that anywhere on the monument... ugh. Still, glad this Filipino hero is finally being recognized by the Spanish, even if it was nearly 100 years after they assassinated him...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICfp_jazwE&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2025-1-2"},{"Name":"Mocmoc P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUzTfPVUkeKNOWiuxPr3HITdaAOuQcK7LhUSFGEwliKKM8XWGfG=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a sunny Sunday afternoon in September 2023 when I finally visited the Jose Rizal Monument in Madrid. I had been wanting to see it for a long time, as I am a Filipino and Jose Rizal is our national hero. I highly admire him for his courage, his intellect, and his commitment to fighting for freedom and justice.

The monument is located in the Parque de Santander, a small park in the Chamberí district of Madrid. It is a replica of the Rizal Monument in Manila.

I left the monument feeling inspired and uplifted. I knew that I would never forget my visit to this place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZzrTSZQ&fid=0x0:0xc5da4a1a6d075063"],"When":"2023-9-10"},{"Name":"Tristan Dwyte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNU-MmGLiN_irpQ8N6sJKS4R7F3MdDG2ibBmdnaiG0IEIZzdY0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This is a must-see for every Filipino who visits Madrid. title: Monumento al Marqués del Duero
address: P.º de la Castellana, 70, Chamberí, 28046 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This statue stands in tribute to Manuel Gutiérrez, the Marquess del Duero and a Spanish general during the Carlist War of succession to the Spanish throne. His is honoured for his victories that eventually lead to the defeat of the rebellion and restoration of the Bourbons to the Spanish throne.

This monument is an equestrian statue and depicts Marquess del Duero on horseback (obviously). That's about all I can say about it since the statue sits in the middle of a busy roundabout and I just didn't feel like getting run over for a better view, especially for someone who is likely unknown outside of Spain. Nothing wrong with the statue, but I wouldn't go out of the way.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1Ib-rQE&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"Cristian Carrero Roca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjruhZF37hpNlAGlHA2lb53Nh4Ou54GL3vwMRClIc0F5LEdFk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento elegante y con mucho encanto, perfecto para descubrirlo paseando sin prisas. La estatua y el conjunto transmiten un aire clásico y solemne, con buenos detalles que se aprecian al acercarse. Me gustó especialmente cómo encaja en el entorno: es de esos puntos que dan carácter al lugar y que, aunque no seas un apasionado de la historia, te invitan a parar, mirar y hacer una foto.

Es una visita rápida pero agradable, ideal para completar una ruta por la zona y sumar un toque histórico al paseo. Si vas con buena luz, se disfruta aún más, porque la composición y el entorno hacen que el monumento luzca mucho.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIWBBpBXlKk7PFYHuZWo-TDvrSDTT2o-LEU5Z_BZdCLGammIA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento al Marqués del Duero en Madrid es una escultura majestuosa que homenajea al militar Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha. El caballo y el realismo de la figura destacan por su detalle, y la base muestra sus victorias más importantes. Ideal para amantes de la historia y la fotografía.

Dato curioso: Fue inaugurado en 1885 y es obra del escultor Andrés Aleu.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBI68t15q0eIylhq3jDXBhR&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento ecuestre majestuoso dedicado a Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha, Marqués del Duero, distinguido militar español del siglo XIX. La escultura representa con gran detalle y elegancia al general montado a caballo, transmitiendo la dignidad y el carácter de este importante personaje histórico. Ubicado en el Paseo de la Castellana, el monumento se integra perfectamente en uno de los ejes principales de Madrid, siendo un testimonio pétreo de la historia militar española. La calidad de la obra escultórica es notable, con una excelente ejecución de los detalles tanto del jinete como del caballo. Es un lugar ideal para los amantes de la historia y la fotografía, ofreciendo una oportunidad para conocer más sobre las figuras que marcaron el devenir de España. Un monumento que merece reconocimiento y visita dentro del patrimonio madrileño.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJx8P9QtFBqT70yfr20sndE3yc6uVKBLBLsJKBg7XJPrGKrGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Estatua ecuestre clásica dedicada al general  Manuel Gutiérrez de la Concha e Irigoyen, general destacado en la lucha contra el carlismo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAeuNL39kHoukZCkfD4aXxO&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-11-22"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Obra del escultor Andrés Aleu en 1885, fué sufragada por suscripción nacional con un coste de 143.000 pesetas, la estatua se fundió en Sevilla con el bronce procedente de cañones donados por el cuerpo de artillería. El Marqués está vestido con traje de campaña y espada tirando de las tiendas con la mano izquierda y levantando la derecha indicando un objetivo.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICktbeUNQ&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2018-11-21"},{"Name":"Victoria Senaty","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXDqI6YcQt-mtmIGFFLGaGy-ebJ3tEwmyjjrN0PDXKEpEamT1h0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"En homenaje a este ilustre, que fue también político 5 veces presidente del senado; como luchador en las guerras carlistas, y por lo tanto isabelino. Haciendo esta defensa llegó a ser capitán general.
La Reina Isabel II le otorgó este título de marquesado. Era también buen empresario, tuvo muchos cultivos de caña de azúcar en Málaga, San Pedro Alcantara.
Por esta época no solo el don de la palabra valía, que hizo buen uso de ello, sino que hacia falta destreza en el campo de batalla, hablamos de finales del 1800, que había que lidiar con cercana Portugal, para conquistar terrenos. En el monumento ecuestre señala con el brazo a la Castellana?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICKgM3cuAE&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2021-3-24"},{"Name":"Domingo González Gálvez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKO2KxJdpJVDbrQSvbdw4QaNKZSuSbFt8HzF9XA7rpbrUBWGHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Bonita escultura en el paseo de la castellana
Foto y reseña en agosto del 2025","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBUEkwk7du3fd4bOM8IIi5m&fid=0x0:0x34b59cbdb431c889"],"When":"2025-8-6"}]

title: Monumento dedicado a los Saineteros de Madrid
address: Chamberí, 28010 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
owner: {"id":"","name":"Monumento dedicado a los Saineteros de Madrid (Owner)","link":""}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrTIbeSRTZp5Sa-saexhGZIAagis3FYMCk6ppqxr3YPAwdHIUT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento dedicado a los Saineteros Madrileños.
Se encargó el conjunto escultórico, originalmente llamado Monumento a los Chisperos al escultor Lorenzo Coullaut Valera en 1910.
Tras petición y reivindicación del periodista Mariano de Cavia, por el reciente fallecimiento de Ricardo de la Vega, porqué se les diera el reconocimiento a los escritores de Sainetes.
Según en su placa, corona el monumento un grupo formado por chispero, manola y una pareja típica del Madrid castizo del siglo XIX, debajo del cual están los bustos de Ramón de la Cruz, Chueca, Ricardo de la Vega y Barbieri, en los bajorrelieves del monumento se escenifican obras del género.
El monumento fue inaugurado originalmente en la glorieta de San Vicente el 23 de junio de 1913, con la asistencia de la infanta Isabel, en representación del rey Alfonso XIII, y el Alcalde de Madrid, Eduardo Vincenti, entre otras personalidades. Dos años después fue trasladado al Parque de la Dehesa de Arganzuela donde permaneció olvidado, hasta su traslado a su actual ubicación, en 1933, a la Plaza de los Chisperos en el distrito de Chamberí.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDbqfKupgE&fid=0x0:0x601d57df31339b00"],"When":"2024-8-6"}]

While not atypical, the statue is slightly unusual for having the general sitting on a prancing horse. The monument is a bit out of the way and not that close to the tourist circuit in Madrid. I wouldn't recommended going out of the way to see it unless already planning to visit the Parque del Oeste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICM2oHf0wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2019-8-12"},{"Name":"Angie Amboni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWNCvvOhPikXDHhGSqxeHBil2Xgekh13uvEvt_b3pneofjTvQXdfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a beautiful  place","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento imponente que honra al General José de San Martín, el gran libertador de Argentina, Chile y Perú. La estatua ecuestre captura la figura heroica de este prócer sudamericano que jugó un papel fundamental en la emancipación de América del Sur. Su ubicación en el Parque del Oeste proporciona un marco natural apropiado para reflexionar sobre los lazos históricos y culturales entre España y las naciones hermanas de América Latina. El monumento está muy bien conservado y la figura del general se presenta con dignidad y autoridad. Es un punto de encuentro importante para la comunidad argentina en Madrid y un símbolo de los fuertes vínculos que nos unen. Muy recomendable su visita.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tito Rubio","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQxmo6mQaJ-jpXRWak2CdDTM5wjRUdpYxV0TDYJj1nb75_p6dZ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Finalizado en 1961, se sitúa en el centro de una glorieta oval. La estatua ecuestre se alza sobre un pedestal de granito levantado en lo alto de una plataforma ajardinada con tres escalinatas. Muestra al general vestido con uniforme militar y en postura de saludar con la mano derecha. El óvalo de la glorieta, rodeado de grandes plátanos, enmarca adecuadamente al monumento y crea un remate interesante a los tres paseos y acceso frontal que confluyen en él.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1yr7Afw\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2023-12-27"},{"Name":"Hernán Gutierrez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXChmrOJID08gziXu5fImCUtbdd7d7axyCFKm8AUjfy59_CjAjN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hermosa la estatua del Padre de la Patria Argentina, disfruté mucho la visita. También muy lindo leer reseñas de españoles largando espuma por la boca por tener en su capital semejante monumento, encima de mantenerlo reluciente con sus impuestos. Gracias, saludos desde Mendoza, Argentina! :D","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICZg--kQQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2023-9-16"},{"Name":"Germán Pulvett","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX8ZcKYThU18A7REiYDsdEtDwbqb0fi0y3qDIyf_-N1y6UGEdl0-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un muy bonito monumento ecuestre al General San Martín, libertador del sur de Sudamérica. Se encuentra en un bonito estado y con posición en dirección al museo de América.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDjxLuiPA\u0026fid=0x0:0x5dc97e96e814d6ca"],"When":"2024-4-29"},{"Name":"Doncelador","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnewNEbYYaXdHD0epgVByIWzW2jKqBZMPTzU18-HYzM_sBuOGCqw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Estatua ecuestre en memoria a José de San Martín realizada en bronce por el escultor Louis Joseph Daumas, el pedestal es obra de Herrero Palacios realizado en granito. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ferhat Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWV6W2gfwUqAFIDgffx1HATO6JsIPotrLYKf7X6lAbflWpp-7tw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A charming tribute to one of Spain’s literary greats! The Statue of Jacinto Benavente, located in the peaceful Parque del Retiro in Madrid, is a simple yet elegant monument that beautifully honors the Nobel Prize-winning playwright.

The statue blends seamlessly into the park’s serene atmosphere, making it a lovely spot to pause, reflect, and appreciate Spanish culture.

Whether you’re a fan of literature or just strolling through Retiro, this statue is worth a quick visit for its historical significance and picturesque surroundings.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCom53nWQ&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-4-20"},{"Name":"Manuel Urquidi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVb3NqeqLMbUnMDHCCGqfKIrXOgRZeGLl7N3nZOPBiM7Lx4le2p=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This statue of the 1922 Nobel Prize in Literature winner, Jacinto Benavente, was funded through a public appeal that raised over one million pesetas. The statue, created by sculptor Victorio Macho, aims to immortalize the soul of the artist, as mentioned by Macho himself. It was inaugurated in April 1962. The area is also home to some oddly shaped trees like yew trees and horse chestnuts.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID_0_SrGQ&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-1-26"},{"Name":"Jim De Mauro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYTq70wrnbeJxNH8_FvCSQjFCURTl0uZJE-ekM3hY8Wvk5v9dy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the most exotic trees we have been able to find was near this statue.  The shapes are exotic and intriguing.  We were not able to determine if they grew this way or they were pruned to look so unreal.  We spent a half an hour just sitting and taking photographs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE0r-Kaw&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2017-12-31"},{"Name":"david howells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv00dm90sqOsiG9tuO5orrJOqUEDS-SlSH6CFfk8dmCBLrELi0Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice area of Retiró park, very pretty with some lovely quirky trees and a cool monument.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIChsorPDA&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Geovanny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpba9fybFOGKARgiQWJJKLXixzY6BzcQ8Id_v0GFsgkaMSRfk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jacinto Benavente, a highly influential Spanish playwright born in Madrid in 1866 and who died there in 1954, significantly revitalized Spanish theater with his realistic comedies and social satires, earning him the Nobel Prize in Literature in 1922; his prolific output of plays, which explored the moral complexities of Spanish society, cemented his legacy as a key figure in 20th-century Spanish drama","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDIzOWHWA&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2025-4-7"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Jacinto Benavente, considered to be the foremost Spanish writer of the 20th century and was awarded the Nobel Prize for Literature in 1922.

The monument features a bronze classical sculpture featuring a woman (presumably an actress), hold a theatre mask as if about to place it onto her face. The sculpture stands atop a plinth, which a rectangular stone block bearing the name of Jacinto Benavente and a bronze relief sculpture of the writer.

A beautiful classical statue and all the more so for it's easy to understand reference to a Nobel winning writer.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICc_L-c-gE&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"A V","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJZBqTmmYT3Q0x4e4TLC7rAKSnv94GL00nBaa9xzXt_6PhbxQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very well maintained and gorgeous area surrounding statue to famous Spanish dramatist.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID44KroBg&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2017-11-10"},{"Name":"Miguel P.C.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPDy8QrAcFWEOFTkH4s_QD0aosAntu-Z4gpRrjANDg-25LaA6qXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful garden, well kept and nice to walk around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICO_oKtngE&fid=0x0:0xdfb79e16d3b4103c"],"When":"2022-6-11"}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Leslie Joseph Pattison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6PJPTMLQYa4SAcrOtu4fEd49uhc8LubZbNJ8FqPUK8qviqqc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"CASTELLANO · Monumento a la Constitución de 1978 de Madrid

As you wander around Madrid, you will notice that there are loads of political memories shared with the proud Madridians.

This open cube white marble structure is pleasing to the eye. It is open on all sides, to show that it is for all Spaniards.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pranayamananda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWeradio62hnkhh5qVD1uBFNEGb_SlYbnRuG7pJ_KyAl5myFsmX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"4th dimension","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICMzr2RrgE&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2019-10-23"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Este monumento es una magnífica obra que simboliza uno de los momentos más importantes de nuestra historia democrática. Su diseño cubista y moderno contrasta de manera interesante con el entorno clásico de los Nuevos Ministerios. La estructura imponente, realizada en hormigón, representa con fuerza los valores constitucionales que marcaron el inicio de nuestra democracia moderna. Su ubicación cerca del Museo de Ciencias Naturales lo hace fácilmente accesible. Es un lugar perfecto para reflexionar sobre nuestra historia reciente y los logros democráticos.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWrTIbeSRTZp5Sa-saexhGZIAagis3FYMCk6ppqxr3YPAwdHIUT=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento que te sorprende al ir al Museo de Ciencias Naturales de Madrid que comparte edificio con la Facultad de Ingeniería Industrial.
No pasa desapercibido, ya que por su envergadura, su forma cuadrada y color blanco llama la atención.
Un bello monumento dedicado a la constitución española de 1978.
Se puede admirar desde cualquier punto de vista y admite diversas interpretaciones.
Un lugar tan céntrico que siempre me sorprende la suciedad que dejan abandonada los que lo ocupan para hacer botellón.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID7qsfTLg&fid=0x0:0xa6af6dd11bc4e556"],"When":"2024-8-23"},{"Name":"Observador silencioso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV5Kfr24BoKS-SWahVwZTWbNq24LwgMfFgRcZ6TzK7kVv-Y0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Monumento que conmemora el quinto aniversario de la Constitución Española de 1978. Fue diseñado por Rafael de la Hoz Arderius y el escultor José Noja, y se inauguró en 1983 como homenaje a la llegada de la democracia. La obra consiste en una gran estructura de hormigón en forma de arco que simboliza la entrada a la libertad y la unidad del país. Diseño sobrio y minimalista para reflejar la solemnidad del momento histórico que representa y el entorno ajardinado que lo rodea invita a detenerse y reflexionar sobre el valor del consenso y los derechos ciudadanos. No es un monumento turístico, pero sí un punto de referencia que mantiene vivo el recuerdo de la Transición y de los principios democráticos que definieron una nueva etapa para España. En su base se conserva una placa conmemorativa con la inscripción dedicada a la Constitución y al pueblo español.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Álvaro Casado Manso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVms99zee7W9cIl6kDFU1LUYLkY1IwNsis8wDGk5HcZRqdIwug=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Homenaje a nuestra Constitución.

title: Monument to Christopher Columbus
address: Pl. de Colón, Centro, 28001 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mark M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUS9xWFdqeoIGM48SlGzqRbIUYckO5GoiKaVUECu7qOA5BWOej9UQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Monumento a Cristóbal Colón stands as a majestic sentinel in the heart of Madrid, anchoring the vibrant Plaza de Colón with its neogothic elegance. Designed by Arturo Mélida and sculpted by Jerónimo Suñol, this 17-meter-tall landmark is a masterpiece of late 19th-century artistry. The intricate white marble statue of Columbus, draped in a cloak and holding the flag of Castile, gazes eastward, evoking a sense of timeless adventure and maritime legacy.
What makes a visit truly special is the seamless blend of history and modern urban beauty. The monument is situated within the Jardines del Descubrimiento, where the roar of the massive cascading fountain provides a soothing soundtrack to the city’s bustle. Standing at its base, you can appreciate the intricate carvings on the pedestal that detail the famous voyages.
The surrounding area is a cultural treasure trove; the square also hosts the world’s largest Spanish flag and the fascinating "Julia" sculpture by Jaume Plensa. Whether you are a history enthusiast or simply looking for a picturesque spot to relax between visits to the nearby National Archaeological Museum and the upscale shops of Serrano, the Columbus Monument is an essential, uplifting stop on any Madrid itinerary.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCp8sd7f9KzUU38ZsT7oiCW&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2025-12-23"},{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Super detailed monument in a cool part of town. It sits opposite the Bronze statue of a Fat Lady by Fernando Botero and is really cool to view at sundown. Every angle of this square looks good and is well-displayed. The monument itself is on a tall dais with outstretched arms near Centro Colon.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdjtqvMg&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2024-2-15"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Christopher Columbus, the explorer who discovered the Americas for Spain. The monument consists of a statue of columbus atop a 17m high plinth which is built in the Gothic style. It's located in the centre of a roundabout in a very busy road and because it's so high up and so far from the pedestrian pavement, it's pretty difficult to get a good view of it.

One good thing about it's location is that the Torre Colon provides an interesting backdrop if taking photos from Plaza Colon. It's good to see the statue for it's historical value, but thumbs down for the difficulty in getting good views of the monument.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1IaT5AE&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"George Messinia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLCxA8R_mO15QqKHTo8jPP0_YjV-KgANNdlMxoMmbA5sKi-qQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Columbus Square was originally called 'Plaza de Santiago', but was renamed in 1893 in honor of the famous explorer who discovered America. The square is dominated by the statue of Columbus, Monumento a Cristóbal Colón, standing on a tall column, looking in the direction of the new world. The square is also home to the Jardines del Descubrimiento, a park first opened in 1970 where you can admire various sculptures as well as a monument dedicated to the discovery of America. Just in front of Columbus Square is the National Archaeological Museum of Spain and the National Library.
On the north side of the square are the twin skyscrapers Torres de Colón which are two 117m high office skyscrapers with 23 floors. They were built between 1967 and 1976 by architect Antonio Lamela. Today the towers are being renovated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJudW1Ng&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2023-6-30"},{"Name":"Seokjin Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtf6A7X2UDP--Xi1vhwXxfhLJk0GUh_pTYJvgqrBOTATbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a neo-Gothic monument built between 1881 and 1885. Not only the statue, but also the base and pillars are elaborately decorated.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDL7sjfcg&fid=0x0:0x33d1b8829355e4a"],"When":"2024-6-27"},{"Name":"Anitha Shree","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmSJgqpLoJyhJzzKLLH65ZR1ErvZRP6Iq1iAyjFjX_V2_mKvxt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a nice monument along side the walk. descriptions: Memorial obelisk honoring those slain during the May 2 rebellion against French troops in 1808.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This Monument to the Fallen for Spain, colloquially known as the 'Obelisk' is the Madrid equivalent to the tomb of the unknown soldier. Originally intended to honour those who died in the Mayo uprising during the French occupation, it was re-dedicated to all fallen soldier of Spain, except for the aforementioned uprising.

Like many such monuments, this also has an eternal flame. A worthy tribute to all of Spain's fallen.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1IbjNw&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2019-4-22"},{"Name":"david howells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv00dm90sqOsiG9tuO5orrJOqUEDS-SlSH6CFfk8dmCBLrELi0Jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This memorial (Monumento a los Caídos por España), also known as the "Obelisco", commemorates the victims of the uprising on 2 May 1808 (Dos de Mayo) in Madrid against the French occupation. After the uprising, numerous Spaniards were executed here by the French.
It is also the national memorial for all Spaniards who have been killed in war. It is similar to the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier in the UK/US but I’m unsure if it contains such a tomb? English sources vary 🤷
It also has a permanent eternal gas flame. This might explain the lack of access by a high sided railing fence.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICh8rKCfg&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2023-2-9"},{"Name":"Diego Caicedo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUeT5xPIRir96hdnD_9IOq5jnKEpMQWtEqH7_ZC1x6B6XABBI5G=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Incredible zone. One of the gorgeous Madrid has. Please don't lose the opportunity to discover this place and the neighborhood.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE8-f9qQE&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2019-4-21"},{"Name":"UnDiplomatic Wife","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU2Q5lNYLAzz4OhBrBoNFqt1ckplhNOgm2XMLpdlKiisgx49k6QOQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Because El RETIRO park was closed, we walked nearby to see the MONUMENT TO THE FALLEN FOR SPAIN which is a memorial obelisk honoring those slain in the rebellion against French troops on May 2, 1808.

It's a nice green moment in this beautiful city. Pass by if you are in the area!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDhxumE9QE&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2023-3-7"},{"Name":"Seokjin Ham","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhtf6A7X2UDP--Xi1vhwXxfhLJk0GUh_pTYJvgqrBOTATbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a place to honor those who sacrificed for Spain, particularly those who fought against the French Napoleonic army during the Madrid Uprising of May 2, 1808, or the Spanish War of Independence. At its center burns the Eternal Flame, a continuously burning fire symbolizing remembrance for the fallen. On Spain’s national holidays and commemorative days, including Dos de Mayo (May 2nd), official wreath-laying ceremonies and military events take place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCwitHKjwE&fid=0x0:0xdcaa7153d2243b83"],"When":"2025-3-17"},{"Name":"G L L","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmNfucYi8OYjI1lEi7kJWHeVjtPXvy5gLAtPZG5-AKa2Lo-w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's an Obelisk Monument to the Heroes of the Second of May. It was created in 1640 by Pietro Tacca. The iconic equestrian statue is famous as the world’s first to depict a horse rearing solely on its hind legs, an extraordinary feat made possible by balance calculations reportedly advised by Galileo Galilei. With the Royal Palace of Madrid rising majestically in the background, the monument catches my attention and perfectly blends history, science, and royal grandeur in one unforgettable setting. I so enjoyed the walk thru of this fantastic place.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCCy5towdqlzi3pT6cuY2_w&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2026-2-1"},{"Name":"Rae Zyon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUG1QtdDeQPQLETzpCBgyDyGAAEvIdbUpAe1YDVy3QwmQLrwpSA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The monument work is incredibly detailed, and the surrounding fountains and sculptures of lions add a regal touch to the entire plaza. With the Royal Palace and the Teatro Real as its backdrop.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKs1uj6S41V1rOx0AAF0rT&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2026-1-15"},{"Name":"João Miguel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz-h8Art0byiddHrXO7ll2LdjINgfgDctaE0x1np9Dj0IW2f2m=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Cool looking statue about Filipe IV.
When I visited the floor was a bit dirty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAHg3tmQgdPWIPYLjvk3mLR&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2026-2-24"},{"Name":"Ziyad Alharbi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8LuXpNc57qdcdw3zrD7GpvhSWIbHiANHRN66HH7Lm_fjR5g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Monument to Felipe IV in Madrid showcases a mesmerizing fountain accentuated by the regal backdrop of the Royal Palace. The interplay of water, light, and architecture creates a picturesque scene, drawing visitors into a realm where history and art intertwine seamlessly. The grandeur of the palace serves as a fitting contrast to the intricate details of the monument, offering a visual feast that captures the essence of Madrid's cultural richness and architectural splendor. It's a sight that not only delights the eyes but also transports one into a realm of timeless beauty and historical significance.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICv64Wy9wE&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2024-12-14"},{"Name":"SuperJ 1240","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZRY2bKLwpeJCtsRuyrp9abLILBpiWNR8g2JCo7KQt74xrErA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great relaxing spot to relax after a long days walk with the view of the Palace. Very positive and tranquil atmosphere provided with the water trickling down.

The monument or fountain of Philip IV is a memorial to Philip IV of Spain in the center of Plaza de Oriente in Madrid, by artist Pietro Tacca, opened in 1640.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD-qv6Zg&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2024-4-8"},{"Name":"Sujay Sreekumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVumGJV6xX-6oOoutWU4H-QZK8DBm7Z4WoS8V_5PLgc6Dfl9alo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a very picturesque and nice area of Madrid, right opposite the palace. Nice to stroll by. Recommend to go around here.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDwnIq2Yw&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2025-3-24"},{"Name":"snarkyguy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpLEkMbqQ117vEXR5NomvRhhZgkwVvVtKfHyjAnrI4JKwbnhs2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"If you're going to the Royal Palace of Madrid (Palacio Real de Madrid), you will likely pass this monument to Felipe IV. Fun fact, before this statue was built, it was one of the first statues of a horse + rider erected to stand solely on the horse's rear legs. Kind of cool. Equally cool is the area and pseudo-park around the monument. It's got some Greek figures around it, some lions, and a fountain (with a sign that reminds you the water is NOT drinkable). It's a really chill place to relax as there are some benches around and lot's of bushes.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICdmpyh8QE&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2024-2-14"},{"Name":"Wizard of oz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoFxXYY4XMz_HalIhvt1bqTaU4wCY4FATx5NzUbuItM9y0Yb8wUw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The statue of Felipe IV at Plaza de Oriente is gorgeous. The Royal Palace is also near by with its glamorous architecture..Those visiting the palace cannot miss the statue of Felipe IV..İts also very close to the famous Plaza Mayor where you can enjoy snacks,drinks or any other food you desire..","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDEu-7bcw&fid=0x0:0xda7a7c767d12f0c4"],"When":"2019-4-5"}]

title: Monumento al Cabo Noval
address: Pl. de Ote., 9, Centro, 28013 Madrid

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Corporal Luis Noval, a Spanish who served in the Spanish Colonial wars in Morocco. He was taken prisoner by the Rif forces, who forced him to take them to the entrance of the Spanish camp. The Spanish soldiers did not shoot when they saw Noval coming, but he shouted out a warning to his comrades that it was an ambush and died in the following firefight. After his death, he was awarded the second class cross of the Military Order of San Fernando.

This monument depicts Noval in uniform, marching with his rifle on his shoulder. Behind his is a Spanish women, holding up the Spanish flag to encourage Noval onwards. At the base of the monument you can see the Rif rebels scattering at the sight of Noval.

The monument stands in Plaza de Oriente, near the royal palace and worth a visit to get the bit of history. It's lovely to see a nice monument honouring and otherwise ordinary soldier instead of some rich aristocrat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcgsLI7gE&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2020-2-17"},{"Name":"Francisco Leung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVrsCUuLOU9HZpwdyFGCYf97VlwByAtR-r9wMwJl9ZmusLoiqhB=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a nice monument that remembers Luis Noval Ferrao, who was a soldier in the Spanish army. It's located in the Gardens of Cabo Noval, which appears to be a smaller sub-section of Plaza de Oriente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ3OmvOQ&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2023-6-22"},{"Name":"BradinHK","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWh6zDfP2gQdpxFs5vZrrUNYezD0Dpnk56YFX0OBmXdNJCxRY4DFg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"One of the interesting things to see at Plaza De Oriente is the monument to Luis Noval Ferrao, a heroic Spanish soldier who fought and died during battle in Morocco in 1909.

Ferrao was noted for his bravery and heroic fighting, becoming a symbol of national pride and nationalism during the early part of the 20th century. A product of that movement was this bronze statue was created by Spanish sculptor Marino Benlliure in 1912.

Here you find a bronze figure, fully dressed in soldiery attire and gear, walking forward in front of a large scale stone flag being held by a female figure. The statue is atop a decorative stone pedestal, with inscription in Spanish.

It is a nice war memorial, located at the northern end of Plaza De Oriente in an area referred to locally, and in travel books, as Jardines Del Cabo Noval. It is worth having a quick look if you enjoy seeing monuments during your travels.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE3LDGZQ&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2018-9-8"},{"Name":"Jonathan Canales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0mSyJjLzsV21q79054K1crJ8IayiaCW_8ZyC9epoh-RVDEDgvdg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tucked away statue with beautiful detail regarding a national hero.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Lucena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXAnbPEgO38IAgd5mIrYHf4QXKfnMypv1751f6z9U8cL9E_HQHDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento homenaje al cabo Noval, muerto en la guerra de África en 1909 por avisar a sus compañeros de una emboscada enemiga, inaugurado en 1912 con la asistencia del rey Alfonso 13 el monumento es obra del escultor valenciano mariano benlliure,genio responsable de muchas obrad instaladas por todo Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDRtSGrZd1m2Qae-nit1Yjv&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2025-9-26"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento al Cabo Noval en la Plaza de Oriente es un tributo a un soldado heroico que salvó la vida del rey Alfonso XIII. La estatua en bronce muestra al Cabo Noval en una pose valiente y decidida. Se encuentra en un entorno privilegiado, muy cerca del Palacio Real, lo que permite admirar varios monumentos históricos en un mismo paseo. Es una obra que recuerda actos de valentía y lealtad. Un lugar de gran valor histórico en Madrid.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Davide Pizzi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWz7eu3ngE_5MLgmwkNyqP8hPmJcrBxnXxnIhpnQ2Sc3MTiZvpl8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Il monumento in onore del caporale Noval , morto nella guerra in Africa nel 1909 per aver avvertito i suoi compagni dell'imminenza di un'imboscata nemica.
L'eroismo del soldato ha dato origine a questo tributo. Il monumento si trova nei Giardini di Cape Noval, che costituiscono la parte settentrionale di Plaza de Oriente. A metà strada tra il Palazzo Reale e il Monastero di La Encarnación, il posto è uno dei più silenziosi dell'ambiente.
Inaugurato nel 1912 con l'assistenza del re Alfonso XIII , il monumento è opera dello scultore valenciano Mariano Benlliure.
L'artista valenciano è responsabile di molte altre opere installate a Madrid, come il monumento a Don Álvaro de Bazán , la figura di Goya di fronte al Museo del Prado, alcune sculture sulla facciata del Metropolis Building o alcune delle incredibili opere funebri del Pantheon di uomini illustri.
Il gruppo rappresenta Luis Noval in marcia con il suo fucile in spalla. Una bandiera tenuta da una donna vola dietro di lui.
Il suo prezzo è stato pagato con un tributo popolare grazie all'impulso di un numerose di donne. La regina Vittoria Eugenia era una dei benefattori, i cui nomi sono incisi sul retro.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDsqsLl6QE&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2020-2-29"},{"Name":"Sylvia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVOWq9WYcCoOzNqXTQwC4axJG5Si91HKepVCCpOlBLrxjAg7NVFbA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"En la plaza de Oriente, en unos jardines que llevan su nombre está el monumento del Cabo Noval, heroico soldado que aviso a sus tropas de un emboscada en la guerra de África. Es obra del escultor valenciano Mariano Benlliure. Zona tranquila y muy bonita para pasear.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICyiYKZSA&fid=0x0:0xa91041363b237a25"],"When":"2021-2-3"}]

title: Monumento al Sagrado Corazón de Jesús
address: Moncloa - Aravaca, 28011 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews: [{"Name":"jmanxxi 42014","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlgKUXaauAZV6K4MQq3KsXjiKKwQAsXyI3lybeSB3Vx7jBbac=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Recién acabada la Guerra Civil la Casa de Campo (que como es bien sabido fue frente de batalla) estaba muy devastada, en este lugar el alferez Mayalde, del bando nacional, recordaba haber salvado si vida casualmente tras un bombardeo republicano que diezmó a su unidad. Con este motivo levantó esta estatua del Sagrado Corazón, e inició siendo ya, alcalde de Madrid la tradición de venir aquí a orar y buscar unos momentos de paz.\nAún cuando hoy en día muchos no saben pq está esto aquí, hay que contárselo, para que siga siendo este lugar de paz que tanto necesitamos! ¡Mil gracias a los voluntarios que mantienen el jardín que lo rodea! Basta comparar con cualquier otra zona de la Casa de Campo para valorar su trabajo ¡¡seguid así💪!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAt0mCahZtw33t7XG4CciXQ\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b8327454a69d71"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Jörge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWXeWEXqdr5t3OlbRokb_Dhsg38mDGwuZo9JWUkx-spF0MuHs0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento realizado en el año 1940 por iniciativa de José María de la Blanca Finat y Escrivá de Romaní, conde de Mayalde y alcalde de Madrid. Durante la Guerra Civil, la casa de campo fue escenario de numerosos enfrentamientos pertenecientes a los episodios de la Defensa de Madrid. En las proximidades del lugar en el que se levanta el monumento, Mayalde aún siendo alférez del Bando Soblevado sufrió un bombardeos por parte del ejército republicano, en el que estuvo a punto de morir. Tras el fin del conflicto, decido levantar el monumento en agradecimiento al milagro. El conjunto está compuesto por una columna coronada por la imagen del Sagrado Corazón de Jesús. En la parte inferior cuenta con una placa conmemorativa. A los lados del monumento se conservan dos obuses de la Guerra Civil, que originalmente fueron cuatro","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCwcM9tcgACXz8jWf2-YerN\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b8327454a69d71"],"When":"2026-1-14"},{"Name":"Javier De Diego","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVh9ISBXa62KUHQ358QE1b9jLAqho3yhCfiYbZXcHPX1FrbK7Ub8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un rincón dedicado a nuestro Rey y Señor Jesucristo. Muy bonito. Se respira paz absoluta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBO-65YpUnZ6kmYEbuMYoS1\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b8327454a69d71"],"When":"2025-11-20"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento histórico muy significativo situado en la Casa de Campo de Madrid. Este monumento al Sagrado Corazón de Jesús fue construido después de la Guerra Civil Española como símbolo de paz y reconciliación nacional. La escultura es impresionante y está rodeada de un ambiente muy tranquilo y pacífico entre los árboles. Es un lugar perfecto para la reflexión y el recogimiento espiritual. El acceso es gratuito y está abierto las 24 horas. Merece la pena visitarlo por su valor histórico y simbólico.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carlos Arellano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX-PpytgcznWnxxTbFpjwCCo4K6wKz-NgZ75tQOm2Vlt_ktGlE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Un pequeño jardín vallado dentro de la casa de campo con un bonito monumento al sagrado corazon","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBTlB3oqiR4wOOP9trbmMd_\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b8327454a69d71"],"When":"2025-11-23"},{"Name":"Eloy Requena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKuc07uWxJrfWXVNg-m6N7iH7qchW43NVUeisEuYj1OIno_HA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un rincón escondido y desconocido para muchos en pleno corazón de la Casa de Campo","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDAppb3BA\u0026fid=0x0:0x4b8327454a69d71"],"When":"2025-2-8"},{"Name":"B","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL1a6bMoWX4UVFht8tTDnHeze281myg2VZ3X5mhI6Z_ug6Itw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un jardincito muy coqueto y bien cuidado. Los bustos son Barbieri, Ramón de la Cruz, Chueca y Ricardo de la Vega. Poniéndole su correcta denominación: Saineteros de Chamberi. No hay presupuesto? Un equipo de gobierno tan culto no debería de dejarnos a los vecinos en la ignorancia. En breve habrá que tirar esta escultura porque los Saineteros madrileños se considerarán acosadores! Así que casi mejor no decir nada, porque a mi me gusta!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEvLqOgAE&fid=0x0:0x6f98479486a84086"],"When":"2018-9-30"},{"Name":"Sergio Núñez López","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoUVwiAh1LY-Jex3uQKe7rJVJfzs7F-iRzhfCS4bRByBs4xaKasA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El monumento a los Chisperos o a los Saineteros madrileños está en el centro de Madrid en una plaza asfaltada con forma de esquina. El monumento es bonito.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE75iGCA&fid=0x0:0x6f98479486a84086"],"When":"2018-1-17"},{"Name":"Trapis50","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJAVrBSD8l-4P2b6XGqkxdyebWtl6lWgUKgeSz1Up8o-8tEp20l=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El monumento a los saineteros madrileños es una escultura urbana en la ciudad española de Madrid.
Inaugurado por el entonces alcalde de Madrid Eduardo Vincenti en el mes de junio de 1913,​ se levanta actualmente en la madrileña plaza de los Chisperos —su ubicación original fue la glorieta de San Vicente— y es obra del escultor Lorenzo Coullaut-Valera.
Realizando el  grupo escultórico en bronce y piedra.
Constituye un homenaje a varios compositores y dramaturgos que contribuyeron al desarrollo de la escena teatral madrileña: Ramón de la Cruz, Ricardo de la Vega, Francisco Asenjo Barbieri y Federico Chueca.​
Los bustos que rodean el monumento pertenecen a  Ramón de la Cruz y Ricardo de la Vega en representación del sainete, y de Pío Estanislao Federico Chueca y Robres  y Francisco Asenjo Barbieri, en representación de los que llevaron a la escena las costumbres típicas del pueblo madrileño.
En la parte alta del monumento  se encuentra una composición formada por una pareja típica madrileña, unida a una manola, y tras ellos, el chispero.
En la parte inferior del monumento, se encuentran cuatro  relieves  que representan cuatro escenas típicas de las zarzuelas, Pan y Toros, y otra de la Verbena de la Paloma.
El personaje de chispero, que era un artesano herrero que trabajaba en la fragua,  fue un personaje muy popular desde mediados del Siglo XIX, rememorando al Madrid castizo, donde los sainetes formaban parte importante de las artes escénicas de la villa.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jose Manuel Martin-Corral","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3fmAiWMSjl3dZGRc_Jsy_HJ3i0Qo5Uc77O4Cu5T1imyHVfV20=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento a los Chisperos, realmente se llama a los “Saineteros madrileños” y está dedicado oficialmente a la “Musa popular madrileña”. Ejecutado por escultor Lorenzo Coullaut Valera, homenajea a cuatro grandes saineteros madrileños: Ramón de la Cruz, Ricardo de la Vega, Federico Chueca y Francisco Asenjo Barbieri. Remata el monumento un majo y un chulo piropeando, a la usanza de su época, a la chula y a la maja.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Luis Morato","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXq-8EasUH6krxqWFOUdLDmVabT8krJLTZ4kCqAxJJ8hYPsaE-t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Obra de Lorenzo Coullaut-Valera del año 1913 en homenaje a los cuatro saineteros Ramón de La Cruz, Ricardo de la Vega, Chueca y Barbieri cuyos bustos pueden verse en cada uno de los lados del monumento. Igualmente aparecen  representadas en los bajorrelieves cuatro escenas de dichos sainetes. Coronan la estatua cuatro personajes habituales del Madrid castizo del siglo XIX.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jaime San Cayetano Amor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAGMdOplnBg4XXRNgPnCo8wTqMCslaNtROtn_nS6DXztMGKqv2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento a los saineteros madrileños. Por la noche con la iluminación de las luces le da un toque especial.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBjLHpYg&fid=0x0:0x6f98479486a84086"],"When":"2022-12-18"},{"Name":"Veicar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURhbbToAfCjGCg6w8i3rm0J0PR1Zd7LZOVyHTck72eCG8yM7NY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un lugar para sentarse a descansar, o hablar en una buena localización, rodeado de bares y restaurantes agradables","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Monumento al Descubrimiento de América
address: Pl. de Colón, Salamanca, 28004 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Ana S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJ4_CG1a6wKdn5BLuWHuXaaHualGaWpY6clLZYh4xqbBZ2IkpENQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This monument is dedicated to the Discovery of America and the historical encounter between Europe and the Americas. Designed by Joaquín Vaquero Turcios, it’s divided into three large concrete groups that symbolize different moments and perspectives: the pre‑Columbian world, the voyage of Christopher Columbus, and the meeting of the two continents.\nI came across it by chance, and it made me stop to find out more. A surprising and interesting stop in the middle of the city.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCTi8K57KakkIaKQ3tmtRv4\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2026-1-24"},{"Name":"alex bonick","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXkPghn8i7xhpHglppxQsvurVbfn5dPGMviaRBf6zBGml_SbTTbNQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It's not the \"prettiest\" piece of public art in Madrid by far - but aesthetically that is what makes it interesting. I could see a lot of debate about how this piece fits into national discussions about Spain's post-imperial age and reckoning with the legacy of New World interactions (compare with the Museum of the Americas and the MAN). I found it worth the stop - esp. when I learned it was constructed in the 1880s - it looks newer. The monument is in the Plaza de Colón, which is a park right near the National Archeological Museum (MAN) - which is not to be missed.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICJ06-R9QE\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2023-7-4"},{"Name":"Georges Younes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1af_MnotjZ8yBIdT9rPJYbzM4SW-WSjOmDsOKhwb6iDjgoVaIUg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Monumento al Descubrimiento de América is one of the most challenging public works of art in Madrid, not necessarily in a good way. At the time that it was conceived, it might have been a good idea to use huge slabs of stone that look like poured concrete as the main decorative element of the monument. Time has not been kind to this concept. In the future, this kind of heavy-handed approach might again find favor with the public. But at this juncture, the Plaza de Colón sits empty most of the time, abandoned by a public that's in quest of a gentler and less imperialistic art form.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICavfWu0AE\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2021-8-7"},{"Name":"TRAVELLING {, TO BE PRECISE}","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2XI7Bceq8YlhpLEOAM8c5APSRc5srNS-yjYkvFw85ZLpZqzcqXw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"4 Huge concrete structures carved with figures, texts and key names in the history of the discovery of America. They represent The Prophecies, The Genesis (two blocks) and The Discovery. Made by Joaquín Vaquero Turcios and inaugurated in 1977. Worth a detour.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC4v6Q3\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2016-12-14"},{"Name":"ドンシクルカ","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAA_D8_GnbMKdVKKLEeDyf5UfA_uaj4_DRJusk6dhl48sopXM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Iconic.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICDjZL5VA\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2024-3-31"},{"Name":"Bryan Chiang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVfd2AEjpVxsYI2kB8jbPXqH6BSYmko28fbDHJgacCwdS6hE6Km6Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Good place to visit along with the museum","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eduardo Antonio Molinari Novoa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWL2J83hI-JKTGWir9WP8QrpQV2nI86fDXlHLYl8Un6AHIen3A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento ecléctico y moderno en su diseño. Definitivamente no es el lugar más bello o clásico de Madrid, pero sí toca muy de cerca a aquellos americanos que, como yo, sienten a España muy dentro del corazón. ¿Cómo no emocionarse al ver en esta plaza representada la gesta que involucró a dos mundos que se unieron por España, representada en tantas esculturas y placas? La más grande empresa de la humanidad con ramificaciones que aún repercuten en el mundo, eso se celebra aquí, un vínculo indisoluble entre los millones que de España recibimos lengua, fe y cultura.\nViva España, viva el Rey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQiduuEw\u0026fid=0x0:0x67cdbc4c0292a24a"],"When":"2025-3-11"},{"Name":"Luchi Dorian","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLcKqWzESzn-2VaRilfxcCKlTM5pk91sY9DvaLVLhEh96Z5Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Impresionante monumento ecléctico y moderno que conmemora el Descubrimiento de América en 1492. Ubicado en la emblemática Plaza de Colón, este conjunto escultórico destaca por su diseño único y contemporáneo. La obra combina elementos arquitectónicos con grandes bloques de hormigón y frases grabadas de Cristóbal Colón. Inaugurado en 1977, representa un homenaje audaz y diferente a otros monumentos tradicionales. Es una pieza fundamental del paisaje urbano de Madrid, perfecta para fotografiar tanto de día como de noche cuando está iluminada. Un monumento que refleja la conexión histórica entre España y América.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Ubicado en el Parque del Oeste, específicamente en el lugar donde estaba el antiguo cuartel, el monumento se integra en un entorno natural que invita a la reflexión. Las vistas desde este punto son realmente impresionantes, ofreciendo una panorama única de Madrid y sus alrededores. La escultura transmite un mensaje de recuerdo y paz, siendo un espacio de memoria histórica importante para comprender nuestro pasado. Es un lugar perfecto para quienes buscan conocer la historia reciente de España y rendir tributo a aquellos que participaron en estos acontecimientos. Una alegría que tenga flores frescas el 30 de octubre.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDzar7AFUWjxr6WA6ioaohT&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2025-10-30"},{"Name":"Luis Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW235KrchEY7jAU2usKj6vTT7QhXWWMu0VoebVS3GjLutwJAk3y=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento al poeta Miguel Hernández, diseñado por el arquitecto Enrique Domíguez Uceta, consiste en una especie de plaza triangular dandole su silueta por columnas de piedra Caliza y arenisca rosa en cuyo vértice se enclava una placa de bronce realizada por el escultor Miguel Ángel López Calleja, según el dibujo que hizo Buero Vallejo del rostro de su buen amigo cuando ambos encontraron en prisión. En la base emerge del suelo una punta piramidal como símbolo de resistencia. La ejecución de la escultura y del monumento tuvo un coste de 10 millones de pesetas, de los cuales ocho fueron invertidos por el Ayuntamiento y dos por la Comunidad de Madrid.
El monumento se inaugura en marzo de 1985.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDE5KrcpwE&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2017-9-2"},{"Name":"Rosas en Almíbar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUfUFWIA5U-cA6nDO86JQTULSIPZDT--I2zgfbxJTK8QTObvFY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"No está mal. Un poco soso y feo. La iniciativa es bonita, pero a Miguel Hernández casi ni se ve.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDeu9bOgwE&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2022-10-20"},{"Name":"José Julio Melgares","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVPlI3_WxZ-JbiFDSG6A1n_aKR_BFRpvuYb0hLgejNuccGQun5Z=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento en homenaje al poeta alicantino Miguel Hernández obra del arquitecto Enrique Dominguez Uceta. Destaca un medallón en bronce, realizado por el escultor Miguel Ángel López Calleja, con la cara del poeta que es una reproducción del retrato que le hizo Antonio Buero Vallejo en 1940, cuando estuvieron encarcelados juntos.

"MADRID... esta ciudad no se aplaca con fuego,
este laurel con rencor no se tala.
Este rosal sin ventura, este espliego...
júbilo exhala"
Miguel Hernández

Miguel Hernández escribió un precioso poema dedicado a Federico García Lorca, tras la muerte del poeta granadino, con el que había tenido una lucha de egos:

"Qué sencilla es la muerte qué sencilla
pero qué injustamente arrebatada.
No sabe andar despacio y acuchilla
cuando menos se espera su turbia cuchillada"

Miguel Hernández","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE84Pq5AE&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2017-12-22"},{"Name":"Arturo Villacañas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFDq7wmxmLUqgAL1EUzdv1pu_WF5qpBvDo_51XwQ27UIEKo5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monumento difícil de evitar si se viene caminando desde la Casa de Campo. Se levanta en honor a Miguel Hernández, poeta de la Generación del 36, quien fue separado de su familia e impedido de ver crecer a sus hijos después de ser arrestado por el franquismo con 28 años, debido a sus "simpatías con ideas anti-fascistas".

Amigo de sus amigos (nos conmociona especialmente la "Elegía" que dedicó a la muerte de su íntimo amigo Ramón Sijé); pastor de ovejas de profesión; autodidacta que nunca necesitó de grandes credenciales para aprender a leer por su cuenta y firmar una de las mejores producciones poéticas en castellano.

Moriría en la cárcel de tuberculosis con apenas 32 años. Esto, unido a las penosas condiciones de tortura física y psicológica a la que sus captores lo sometieron durante meses, lo convirtieron en una importante figura de la libertad de expresión y las garantías procesales en España, ya bastante antes de la caída del Régimen (cuando España todavía era una dictadura, hace escasos 46 años). Hernández recuerda a lo peor de Franco; la insensibilidad vulgar del nacionalismo, la inexcusable entrega a sus ideales totalitarios, y su desprecio al significado real y concreto de las causas de "compasión" y "protección de la familia" con las que originalmente justificó su pronunciamiento militar.

El monumento, obra del arquitecto Enrique Domínguez y realizado en piedra pulida, se compone de cuatro columnatas de piedra en forma de V, y un pilar central con medallón que refleja el grabado facial realizado por Antonio Buero Vallejo durante sus visitas a la cárcel. Además, en su parte inferior este pilar se abre para adoptar la forma de un triángulo invertido 🔻, que es el símbolo con el que se "marcaba" a los prisioneros comunistas en los campos de concentración del nazismo (que ahora ha quedado resignificado a símbolo de los perseguidos por ideas políticas).

Todo el complejo escultórico se conserva relativamente bien y se integra perfectamente en un escenario, la Casa de Campo, que todavía alberga fosas comunes de "desaparecidos" y muertos sin nombre, asesinados durante el asalto a Madrid en la Guerra Civil española.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JPB Auteur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVv0_EgnAIWUQHeX31_sSm5IZQi5QrXWitM_fwfM8xy5NbB1xWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Monument dédié au poète Miguel Hernández. 0 voir aussi le parc qui est magnifique","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC41-7TNA&fid=0x0:0x3597519d46babcb3"],"When":"2017-11-25"},{"Name":"Lucy Isabel De Los Reyes Tovar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7XRhTemAolYyAV4u1hspfARbNwnggRBmZb0EEKNuXgQVNxdK1dw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los monumento se levantan como recordatorio, de aquellas personas que han pasado y han dejado huella. user_reviews: [{"Name":"Bob Meadow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJU2pLYy4QH7AEa64d-1yxozoqEo9N-RU-m9HK-wQ0knCCn3g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This beautiful monument portrays Sor Juana Inés de la Cruz, a Hieronymite nun and a prolific Novohispanic writer who cultivated numerous literary genres on the 2nd half of the 17th century and came to be known as the tenth Muse and the Phoenix of Mexico due to her talent and her extensive literary production. Besides poetry and drama, she waz deeply interested in theology, philosophy, science, music and in defending women's right to receive formal education. She does deserve more of such recognitions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBjjux8zlBdjR53JjFS6QjB\u0026fid=0x0:0x19cae5d0184c5125"],"When":"2026-1-25"},{"Name":"macedonboy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL7obIFVFelZpGZFWErr47Wzzrz8xLtHVDOYNGdpIt459EbUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This monument stands in tribute to Juana Inés de la Cruz, a Hieronymite nun who lived in modern day Mexico who was a scholar, scientist, philosopher, composer and poet. He left a large body of work which is studied to this day in Mexico and Europe. She was also a bit of an early feminist in her outspoken views on misogyny, the hypocrisy of men and the difficulties women faced while trying to thrive in academic and artistic fields.\n\nThe monument features a seated Juana Ines de la Cruz wearing her Nun habits of the Hieronymite order. The monument is located on the edge of Parque del Oeste, on Calle de Ferraz. It's a bit out of the way unless your're planning on visiting either Museo Cerralbo or Parque del Oeste.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICM2ub3Jg\u0026fid=0x0:0x19cae5d0184c5125"],"When":"2019-8-12"},{"Name":"Catherine Romero","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQf2hdyHj3MLQ83x_IqkS5K6iO0TcKQ-9wQnU2-GXhnjiWNqnKRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love her!!!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDeg5-d8wE\u0026fid=0x0:0x19cae5d0184c5125"],"When":"2022-10-18"},{"Name":"Matilde Zannin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXnR6zMxmdPSf8uLUL1VWCqYz9cgZiyKQXhEvLABg4y3Z88HI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lesbian icon:)","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Francisco Lucena","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXAnbPEgO38IAgd5mIrYHf4QXKfnMypv1751f6z9U8cL9E_HQHDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Monumento a sor Juana Inés de la cruz una religiosa Jerónima y escritora mexicana la estatua resta realizada en bronce fundido por el escultor José Luis Fernández y es un homenaje del pueblo de México.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAsnEn8GHBvUoux0FRVkfA9\u0026fid=0x0:0x19cae5d0184c5125"],"When":"2025-9-11"},{"Name":"Abraham Figueiras","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJhnimgaUyx0zF-23BzMAOFzSlLwOPVSPLCfJvzyY1I9fggxg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Para un mexicano es sorprendente saber que alguien que es elogiado en México esté representado en Madrid. Al parecer representa la mezcla de las culturas, siendo ella novohispana muy culta y mutidisciplinaria al parecer fue donada a Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhARjhjz5rMAWoSlpZosUzCs\u0026fid=0x0:0x19cae5d0184c5125"],"When":"2025-10-10"},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"El Monumento a Sor Juana Inés de la Cruz es una obra escultórica que rinde tributo a esta destacada figura de las letras hispanoamericanas. La presencia de este monumento en Madrid simboliza los fuertes vínculos culturales entre España y América Latina. La escultura capta la esencia intelectual y artística de Sor Juana, representando su importancia como poeta y pensadora. Es un lugar perfecto para reflexionar sobre su legado literario y su contribución al pensamiento ilustrado.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Gajardo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXd2N_tfxrealbtExV2XiIj5w5xqX7zIEpjeCt5l3K0bo9vx1y-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Un monumento a Sor Juana Inés de la Cruz, una religiosa jerónima y escritora novohispana (mexicana) exponente del Siglo de Oro de la literatura en español.
