[{"Name":"Jallouf Kim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq1wooNouztzrP27L42tA3_wMQq6deJ9Z2jGEcYxB8MbxATQsDdA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"One of the best places in Madrid to eat, enjoy, and truly taste jamón.

The service was extremely fast despite the huge number of people in the place. Both the waiter and the waitress were very friendly, welcoming, and always smiling, which made the experience even better.

The food was excellent. The only small downside was that the amount of jamón was a bit limited, especially considering that I ordered a *ración* portion. That said, the quality and taste were still very good.

Overall, it is highly recommended and definitely worth a visit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDDXcgq_e7XivK9Z_W9H7d1&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2026-1-29"},{"Name":"Steven","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpPgljaYKz4vhBoReo83vlzaQTO0ll-SmRpAtDjKtaNPU6tVB6=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The seafood paella was delicious here! The service by this Filipino lady was amazing and she’s very nice! We order 2 dishes and there was a lot of meats!! Some of the shrimps wasn’t fully deveined

They do sell a lot of iberico hams but you can typically get better prices in grocery stores

We can’t say much about the other food options but the 24 euro for a 2 person paella was a decent deal for a street full of tourist traps","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCxex8ZxBd5Sfa8rJ2WcEFh&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-9-21"},{"Name":"Georgios Karaferis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJz0ax4y2OckSn6HYp10uxtenruZQOchgStaG3dHfGp8yW89A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We came in during the rush hour without a reservation, but the staff was incredibly friendly and found us a table right away. We went with their house recommendations, and every dish was excellent!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB7R0NhpU5Bfqu2Ek-YOyvs&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2026-2-22"},{"Name":"Danny Shin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUJRrEa7i_2NCzRnc07db30KbI3MWip68sPL7c9TRs_qv3E4C8_Ng=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is absolute must-visit! You simply cannot beat the incredible value here.
Being able to get a 2 beers plus a delicious jamon tasting for just €5.99 is truly fantastic and makes it the best budget stop in the city. The jamón is high-quality and the whole experience is a fun, authentic Spanish treat.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDYSE8cSvR-8kbEuw9nD8xk&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-10-20"},{"Name":"K Li","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocICeSPjRGt-Nt8UrhC_e3xU8rPWhQAIuEfkDLBgq2B-x_OX=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Spent an hour here with my favorite iberico ham platter, and I love Jamón ibérico de bellota 50% the most! And the Radler lemon beer is so refreshing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB9uvw6mY4FLM6ZzkZr1c-3&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"sissy z","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjvopW8VNlNmw6IlFYUW88y4Oyq4V2WAKapeQzt7JfHrzBoD8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved it, good food, service was nice too, the waiter heard me speaking Italian so he started to speak it with us. He explained the type of the jamon we ordered and the 75% iberico bellotta was outstanding, best jamon I ever had.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAFhYY6iAUDHo1ipfzW6doR&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-12-30"},{"Name":"Robert Kief","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUlFUpdLhZJ_ZFAmJcnwNskDN7HXT2FiUeoTlTNM1P5l8yP-o0b=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This looks more like a deli that a restaurant. On our very first night we dropped our bags ran out to enjoy the evening and walked into try some of Spain's famous ham and red wine. We ordered a sample platter of hams they gave us a small platter of ham sausages along with our two glasses of absolutely fantastic red wine.  Before we left we picked up some cold cuts for breakfast.  Tried to go back a few nights later and the place was packed to the rafters.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC3q4CAAw&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"I T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSP9P6gV4C0Ca3jGBE0bljJ2SuFzQBhpIs6zCstRkLqm9ZASLm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to stop for a drink and taste real meat. Hamon Iberico is the best one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAG18YZ5zPu6C70FISoYswM&fid=0x0:0x4b6efe15ae279974"],"When":"2025-10-17"}]

Very well maintained. There is a huge, free rose garden. You can also walk to the opposite end for amazing views of the city. There is also a nice spot in the middle near the street where you can sit and have drinks. Gorgeous greenery and flowers and plants. A jewel in the city and not very crowded.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCYyc61HA&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-5-5"},{"Name":"Shonigal Galshoni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAksMz7rF5kJ93o1v93Hzu40dLpnVlyMRYbkpnRcRy_2UHma4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The perfect park!
Paradise!
However: the other side of the park is not even worth mentioning. A big miss and mess.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBej8jpZW_vz0k14na_ROX9&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-10-9"},{"Name":"sampi16 sampi16","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKPGPPXV7zILaB_lgbQlvGy6ZdwEDK8lAp3JTgivfjlBMLcrQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Beautiful place and very was very calm when we were there, a lovely time all around.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCbnK9MdqCNMuPt-fl6Un0e&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-11-29"},{"Name":"John West","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXe-0ZHRah1PfP8S-vXkCX5Qsfyev1LtGf1UPogWu2O14QItQfJyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Amazing Views of Madrid and Sunset was just Gorgeous!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCq1ac9mXWNTN00FPAdtwHL&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2025-11-2"},{"Name":"Pong Lenis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmFxgCYM6gEAt1jIKoZP8ptzgNZL-9zzzKJy5MkI8Asohd2Jid=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a very lovely park, it’s free and doesn’t cost anything, check the local times for when it opens and closes, it has a lovely little pond and a very nice statue in a water fountain, the garden is very well maintained and has lots of lovely flowers. Definitely worth checking out and taking a walk in the park. There are several other monuments close by worth checking out as well.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID5ga2uOg&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2023-10-25"},{"Name":"Ajai Augustine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX1GnkDsopskmBTnz04JjmQNFN-jIRWwPsifkOzswIQi3N2-52a=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Yet another beautiful park within the city limits of Madrid and a really significant one. One end of the park hosts the Temple of Debod even though I couldn't visit it. It was not closed but I didn't get the time to reach there and get some pics. What makes it distinct is that the park comprises a geographically unsymmetrical terrain with slopes where you can sit and enjoy the beautiful sunset. It houses a variety of monuments and also a Bird Observatory within it. Good place to spend your evenings reading or relaxing away from city life!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICj89fv7QE&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2024-4-25"},{"Name":"Elisabetta Borzini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWW9OaJFHYeOlmWeyc9v25DLabeFhCxN7jRlbMj8RkcjNuLAtMf=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This place is a dream!
It’s close to my house so I tend to come here more often than other parks and it’s an oasis of peace.
It’s very large so you can access it from different parts and walk in all directions. It’s extremely clean and well maintained, the trash cans are always empty and the lawns super lush!
It’s an open park, so I wouldn’t be surprised if people slept there at night, but there’s no sign of it.
Also, because of the open park factor I wouldn’t recommend walking there late at night (but I’m a woman so perhaps hyper aware of safety risks).
Dogs are running around everywhere but generally owners are respectful and clean up after them as well as call them back if they see someone uncomfortable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID1zdPLGw&fid=0x0:0xef26c37465a04be4"],"When":"2024-1-9"}]

[{"Name":"Tom Hankin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKwnFNJpRfYsWBqy_LVWmyTAExju50ZZyABorsFVWyWKaeqnA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A really great park since it was reformed a few years ago. It has lovely gardens and children play areas that are suitable for kids of all ages. I regularly go with my 2 year old and she loves going there most of all the parks in the area.

I also go to the park regularly to run on the 1.2km track at night time which is free to everyone and goes around the perimeter of the park, you just have to be careful if you go at busy periods because of kids and dogs that may wander onto the running track.

The park also has a lot of sports facilities that are available such as beach volleyball, football pitches, padel, basketball courts and even for field hockey.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Felippe Leite","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUc3SslhnNTvMFNet4sYIoDm1kfX4igOB58VxIsIV9WeRrkXyugBg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is a great family park inside the Chamberi neighbourhood! There is some great area for kids and you cna grab a few ice creams and aome food for the youngsters.
Also if you are from Madrid, you might get access to the sports complex just across the street. Weekends are the best to check out this amazing venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDk_7jItwE&fid=0x0:0x66210f0b387c2d38"],"When":"2019-7-13"},{"Name":"King Leung Lee","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjONGX13FfixzaCaBoCWCi4UVxdKbqbIKRBFca1SCzfoeiZw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A clean park with good exercise facilities. Also has different places for children to play.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wend Robinson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKk2ZXtQ50iLbU7DYCrzsMF8AgvjAySuRUfehuvGSSLCr1uqA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One of the great things about Madrid is all of the parks. I was there on a particularly hot weekend of about 39 degrees and this park was very quiet. I think that Spanish people know to stay indoors when it's that hot. We made use of a lovely bar and had a wander. There seemed to be plenty to entertain young children too if you are unlucky enough to be in Madrid with them!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adri Luzzatto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVujBC3wfaTuKjKpH73TTl993kPoC8lQobUVs_3RyIT-o53hVxq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The newly renovated park is amazing. Nakaka proud","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7WcsQL-_YjeB8ikBAzP5P--Xr9uZHDVblH8z78yaEZTujZulB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very good park and soon should be even better, as there is a huge area after golf training course was closed.

I am frequent visitor.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"christian thomsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL5Ic8GFMf8kLnHZPaDYIGp4PWvxn1252ijcY6GevagBHRZUg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great place for a run bad training - has a 1.2 km track around the park and also a calisthenics/bodyweight training area in one corner of the park.

Vamos casi todos los fines de semana desde que se inauguró tras la pandemia y siempre lo encontramos limpio y bien cuidado. Tiene zonas y atracciones para niños de todas las edades, y es perfecto para jugar un rato y luego hacer picnic en los jardines. Ojalá todos los dueños de perros fueran igual de respetuosos y recogieran siempre las cacas, porque a veces pagan justos por pecadores. Por lo demás, encantados con el parque.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAyWUsdaCk8tDe4BTrBt3EX\u0026fid=0x0:0xf82a0a2f27603ec1"],"When":"2026-1-18"},{"Name":"Mc Coam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXFh3J88eJOcwK0TDuhS0vJP2HupuegFzsQ-mqD5UG_5DgByFn5=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Agradable se mezcla el sonido de las aves con el sonido de los carros. Cuenta con múltiples parques para niños espacios para sentarse. Además me parece muy bien ubicado para aquellas personas que están muy cerca del hospital puedan respirar y reconfortarse con este pedacito y el alma.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAz1eDGnxjprdVFV9TJM3lS\u0026fid=0x0:0xf82a0a2f27603ec1"],"When":"2025-6-6"},{"Name":"Observador silencioso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV5Kfr24BoKS-SWahVwZTWbNq24LwgMfFgRcZ6TzK7kVv-Y0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Diseño amplio y bien integrado en el entorno urbano. Cuenta con zonas ajardinadas, caminos peatonales y espacios abiertos ideales para pasear, descansar o hacer deporte ligero. Suele estar tranquilo entre semana y tiene buena iluminación por la noche. La mezcla de vegetación y arquitectura contemporánea crea un ambiente agradable, con vistas directas al skyline del norte de Madrid. Es uno de los espacios verdes más recientes de la zona y forma parte del proyecto de renovación del entorno de CTBA, pensado para añadir áreas de ocio y descanso en medio del distrito financiero.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Los usuarios suelen ser educados. .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICehNqOUg&fid=0x0:0x40c8241222983efa"],"When":"2022-9-6"},{"Name":"Consuelo Sastron","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIKUEiWyZ7973Y1ozY3y3EokVUb0-SxARc9ch09RnEbfNU6ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No existe pipican desde hace un año aproximadamente

Esta reseña la estoy escribiendo a las 10:05 y como pueden ver el parque sigue cerrado aunque se supone que abre a las 9:00.

[{"Name":"Costin Anghel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIbK0Cy1jEP_d3SF2DtwEdzl4jtwrFJUm2kgPPOGX9wNsBLeA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Ok","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vivo Vázquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvUyRyXlZBRb-TT4BhrnwZ8T78FNkcDjPnfNdsrNdFZg9teg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Los Jardines De San José De Calasanz son un espacio verde emblemático que honra la memoria del pedagogo y santo español. Este jardín destaca por su extensión y diversidad de instalaciones, perfectas para familias y visitantes de todas las edades. Las zonas verdes están bien mantenidas y ofrecen amplios espacios para actividades recreativas, deporte y descanso. Su ubicación estratégica lo hace muy accesible y es un punto de encuentro importante para la comunidad local. Un espacio que combina funcionalidad, historia y naturaleza de manera excepcional. Definitivamente un lugar que vale la pena visitar.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carmen Gámez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKXOUk3T6UtULJUkEeWlQcQkOfUgxbUCNKV39sP-T1qRT6p9Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Me hice un tratamiento facial completo con Daniela y me encantó. Super profesional. El sitio limpísimo y bonito. Repetiré!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Conchita Vicente","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJqSiKvAB-LITGVt7rpvTcaIncaS6eBO1DaHZq7V7a2Q3Tx0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Es un lugar muy agradable y tranquilo. En el parque infantil se debería pensar en retirar la tierra. Ensucia el parque, pues los niños la echan fuera, resbalan y se caen.
Estyo hace que parezca muy sucio.
A ésto se añade el problema de los perros. Los dueños no recogen sus cacas y los perros campan a sus anchas por los parterres.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Héctor Garcia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKMuGIfA0gBy93la64V8UgeSzEnzQmsbpmTfPTpBpOp1P5VWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"El parque no está mal, acaban de ampliar la zona infantil, pero aún así no es muy grande. El gran problema de este parque es la ausencia de sombras. Los árboles que había no daban gran sombra u los han podado, con lo que menos aún. No han puesto nuevos e  la última remodelación con lo que esto no cambiará en el futuro. Ayer,  hasta las 19 horas no empezó a dar una sombra medio decente.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MRColubi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVIIk_WZjSTO7pKK-2XIklmGrDz98yiFXVLYzsZ7mZ0qHdKWew=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Han realizado una reforma y lo han dejado peor de lo que estaba. Antes había arbustos donde los mendigos y los chavales hacían sus necesidades.Ahora han quitado esos arbustos y han puesto la reja de los niños pegada a la acera, con lo que se salen con facilidad. Ahora está más limpio pero también más peligroso para los pequeños.
En el interior del parque hay un montón de colillas, así que mucho ojo con los niños.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"-SRG LIFE-","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU95ltiOGYbIBozbZa4p1DpaJoZ2Ec4hVsbn3pGwEPkyRo8Vrv3uA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Le pongo 3 estrellas porque está un poco abandonado tanto de limpieza como mantenimiento, el arenero no está mal pero al estar con acceso a cualquier animal puede orinar y excretar cosa que no recomiendo mucho su uso. El parque en sí está acolchado con una especie de goma, lo malo que hay arena y los peques se resbalan, falta de limpieza, colillas de tabaco por el suelo.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Julián Soba","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv7Ev_v-fOww7erP6AR14Xf9XmW7v31WM1GlGwNhoy7Xiah1qL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"5€ por entrar, un precio algo alto para el tamaño del jardin. [{"Name":"Mario García","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVkBUANmFqRWNQhQln-LnZi9yg8iQq-NHtnGUa0qbKckcaPgmxw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Era un gran parque hasta que han dejado de arreglar los bancos (3 rotos) y los perros campan a sus anchas, haciendo sus necesidades en cualquier sitio y asustando a niños pequeños. Además lo cierran aleatoriamente por la excusa de "climatología adversa"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carpe Diem","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVc4Ua60D5DCmgSsGvwZXuPU396NcZ51fQQPoabvAh2aE6P7Xnh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Pese a que los perros están prohibidos campan a sus anchas por todo el parque, pero lo más preocupante, es que hacen sus necesidades en zonas donde hay bebés, que se meten las manos en la boca y pueden pillar cualquier infección.

Lo más gracioso es que, pese a la prohibición no hay nadie que les diga que no pueden pasar.

Los perros se meten en el arenero de los niños y los dueños, no parecen tener dos dedos de frente. Donde hay bebés no deben hacer pis y caca los perros.

Los perros deben tener espacios solo para ellos, para que sean libres de hacer sus necesidades, y jugar. No podemos estar pendientes de que haya pis o caca de perro donde juegan nuestros hijos. Sentido común!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"María Luisa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIUUdjR8ZKUZfWAWA-08b6xosuk8iD-QdjA_j13_wRQerPpfRw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Estará muy bien cuando esté totalmente abierto al público pues lo que ahora llaman parque nuevo del Canal es un estrecho corredor lateral. Aún así, merece la pena visitarlo por su jardín vertical que le da interés al espacio y también por el que dicen que es el único ejemplar de jacaranda que hay plantado en Madrid en un entorno público.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDx6baheg&fid=0x0:0x627d5d1aa76c229a"],"When":"2023-6-11"},{"Name":"Lavidal Vidal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVnF9iAVZZPR88Mpf-bK3q7_RMOvx7-bdtL-kQFL0msdQ804N6u5Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Este parque me encanta, pero le veo un gran problema y es que lleva meses sin luz por la tarde, se han fundido las bombillas y no las arreglan y otro pero enorme que le veo es que en invierno cierra a las 19.00hs y abre a las 10.00hs.
He visto que hay quien se queja de las heces de los perros cosa que yo no he observado si he visto a mamas y papas meter a sus niños entre matorrales para que hagan "sus cosas" y también he visto la guarrería que dejan los papas o los nenes en la zona infantil (envoltorios de bollos, cleenex, servilletas etc) o de la tierra que echan los nenes jugando en las fuentes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"E A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_vA-_O68sbAD9GPcShcNgxM40aVMfY8X0PqJC8wYxwGrKjg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"El parque está muy bien, pero se ven perros sueltos (cuando en las normas indica que tienen que ir atados) e incluso dentro de zonas en las que pone expresamente que está prohibido. address: Plaza de España, 360, Moncloa - Aravaca, 28008 Madrid

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Razvan Panes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLP4LcmLXOWctn9CxEvqsT2nJ_hQi3kXLShF5GoebzNTNIndw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Nice park to have a couple of minutes in the shade and maybe cool off with some water - great for kids, can get a little crowded in the weekends.

You can use it as a small detour in order to get to temple Debod which is located nearby or continue your walk in the next parks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAJtgTWqPiPuxOxUo82GAFD&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2025-8-4"},{"Name":"Xoom Too","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLRzhuxFKh1jOBQiJLb1bjferwZ-xPRZ7v7ReqgRp2P_uVyh9Y4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A simple plaza located towards the west (on the map) of the Plaza de España right across from another small children’s playground with this cool looking tree house with 3 slides coming from all sides and a little window at the top with a safety net and a whole other wooden tiny climbing area with stairs and 2 slides as well.

There’s also a few benches surrounding the area as well. It’s not the biggest best playground ever but it’s still nice and well maintained for the area especially after walking around a bit and maybe your kids want to play for a bit.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL08u9cQ&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2024-6-22"},{"Name":"Isabel Draves","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVvvrsMr0Yyxm30G7aEhsgPo0qo2BGG4ucR_pT_6Ccwltklz6vnCQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were so happy to find this enormous playground after hunting for a suitable playground all morning!  They have huge circular swings and tire swings for adults or kids; swings for kids up to age ten; and swings for toddlers.  There was a large group of young teens playing on the swings and spinning playground equipment during their recess.  Right nearby there were kids ages 5-11 enjoying the amazing rope bridges, wooden ladders, tall play structure, and tall slides.  This truly is a playground for all ages and a relaxing destination for tourists traveling with kids in Madrid. You can whisper to a friend through an underground tunnel and fill your water bottle.  There is even an ice cream store nearby, a few restaurants, and a Cervantes monument if you want to add an educational component.  Safe and fun.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDh3-P_ew&fid=0x0:0xad72a800d76cded7"],"When":"2023-3-21"},{"Name":"Emily Wood","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWPEHA2GBAX666IOePB4TzTfx2gSRBaRWbF4N0CU_hFly_1_TCG5A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really sweet series of playgrounds in a big plaza/park. Es el Belén y el Tiovivo que monta todos los años el Corte Inglés en su centro de Serrano.
También hay una casa que supongo que será la casa de Santa Claus. No llegué a entrar.
El Tiovivo es bonito. De los antiguos.
No estaba terminado por lo que mi valoración no puede ser muy exacta.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICl_5uwjAE&fid=0x0:0x8d0cd17c8baf3870"],"When":"2023-11-29"},{"Name":"Emilio Parmegiani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVloCRxSMgtFhMxBDT6xvX3RcNhh14w2S9hjgAN09ZIcyYDvfue=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Parque infantil localizado en el área externa del corte inglés de la calle serrano. Área con muchos juguetes para niños de 0 a 6 años. #playground #niños #parque","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC2zMmnRQ&fid=0x0:0x8d0cd17c8baf3870"],"When":"2022-4-14"},{"Name":"Pablo Guinea","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXtHc8gSGv0s0XY-2hXXs3OIOnLFKi0QTHzmmshbyPKb1gVDQpipA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"El parque está bastante mejor que la mayoría de los parques infantiles de Madrid, que en general son patéticos.

Además, está muy bien que tenga una cubierta ya que, en días muy soleados, los niños pueden seguir jugando sin abrasarse al tocar las instalaciones.

De todas formas, no pongo 5 estrellas porque el parque ya está en muy malas condiciones por el paso del tiempo. Las cuerdas de algunos de los módulos estaban inicialmente cubiertas de plástico. El paso del tiempo ha hecho que estén absolutamente rotas.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Observador silencioso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV5Kfr24BoKS-SWahVwZTWbNq24LwgMfFgRcZ6TzK7kVv-Y0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Es uno de los pocos parques infantiles de Madrid con techo, lastima que sea tan pequeño. Tiene un tobogán pequeño y algunos juegos más pero le faltan los columpios. El techo da sombra pero no protege de la lluvia. Suele haber espectáculo de títeres por las tardes los viernes y sábado a partir de las 6.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Tiene algunos juegos de movilidad y poco más, no hay bancos pero se puede sentar en el borde del parque que queda en un alto.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Parque Infantil Paseo del Prado
address: Centro, 28014 Madrid
open_hours: {"Friday":["Open 24 hours"],"Monday":["Open 24 hours"],"Saturday":["Open 24 hours"],"Sunday":["Open 24 hours"],"Thursday":["Open 24 hours"],"Tuesday":["Open 24 hours"],"Wednesday":["Open 24 hours"]}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Abel Abad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWpXv04kEgrbKhIMn3iQoZ8y13oP1L1ZxDlTpr-BuynblGmLWg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We recently visited the playground located in Paseo del Prado, Madrid, and while the experience was pleasant overall, there are definitely a few things worth noting for future visitors. The location is truly fantastic—nestled in the heart of Madrid with easy access to some of the city’s most iconic landmarks, museums, and beautiful tree-lined boulevards. The views from the area are stunning, giving both locals and tourists a perfect backdrop for a relaxing afternoon.

The playground itself is clean and well-maintained, offering a safe space for children to enjoy. However, it lacks variety in terms of play structures. There are only a few basic features available, which means that older kids might lose interest quickly. It could definitely benefit from more interactive elements, climbing features, or creative play options to make it more engaging for a wider age range.

Additionally, the absence of restrooms and potable water is a drawback, especially for families spending extended time in the area. It’s advisable to come prepared with bottled water and to know the location of nearby facilities.

Despite these limitations, the playground remains a great place to stop by for a short break while exploring the Paseo del Prado. With a few improvements, it could easily become a top family spot in Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoh_2PYA&fid=0x0:0x44b91fb2b26ab43f"],"When":"2025-4-29"},{"Name":"Xoom Too","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLRzhuxFKh1jOBQiJLb1bjferwZ-xPRZ7v7ReqgRp2P_uVyh9Y4Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A simple park located in the Prado Boulevard that’s quite widely spreadout but doesn’t actually have a lot of stuff as they only have 2 pairs of swings in the middle, a climbing and jumping thing to the right and to the left is a slide.

But it’s a great place for running around or just walking around the Prado Boulevard too. It’s also nice as the whole area around it has benches that are like part of the seperator from the cars.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDHpYirNA&fid=0x0:0x44b91fb2b26ab43f"],"When":"2024-9-18"},{"Name":"Kelley Soper","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXRgh8lJ66v8kqdqLBHhQ7xNH1crtK5Ibys8wnJPmLUy7o05MDC=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Nice place to stop and take a break. title: Hotel Princesa Plaza
address: C. de Serrano Jover, 3, Centro, 28015 Madrid
descriptions: Airy rooms & suites in a refined hotel with an indoor pool, a gym & a Mediterranean restaurant.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Matthew Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUO5XkSumMXJmccPAFQ_oTjyjP9wT47ZMS6sCdeFKKINHLa0yw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I stayed at the Madrid Marriott Hotel Princess Plaza in mid-February 2026. Upon check-in, we were told we would have a city-facing room, which we had specifically selected and paid an upcharge for when booking.

Because we checked in late the night before, we were looking forward to sleeping in. What we did not expect was to be woken up by loud construction at 9 AM. By 11 AM, my head was throbbing from the constant noise, so I called the front desk for more information.

We were informed that we could change rooms to another building, but were not offered assistance transporting our belongings from the seventh floor, across the courtyard, and then up several more floors. Since we were checking out the next day, this option would have only added more inconvenience to an already frustrating experience. The receptionist explained that construction typically ran from 9 AM to 5 PM. With our goal to checkout by 10 AM the following day, we assumed we could manage.

However, to our surprise, construction began again the next morning just before 8 AM. As the day prior, heavy hammer drilling — what sounded like concrete being broken — continued nonstop. With each drill, the noise was extremely disruptive and impossible to ignore. When I called the front desk to explain that we had been told construction would not start until 9 AM, the receptionist claimed the construction team had started early that day. No ear protection or alternative accommodations were offered, leaving us forced to wake up before 8 AM.

I am sure this is a beautiful hotel with dedicated staff, but it would have been greatly appreciated to receive advance notice — either prior to booking or at check-in — about the ongoing renovations and significant construction noise. Greater transparency would have allowed us to make a more informed decision about our stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sofia Pereira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5tSG-FJuj0W28aLXNeEOGqTTWS88mPp2FSwo4xt7y3kTH5rndXA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very nice hotel, conveniently located right above El Corte Inglés and within easy walking distance of several central and charming areas of Madrid.
The rooms are spacious, recently renovated, and well equipped with all the necessary amenities.
The only downside we found was the TV setup: it didn’t have the original remote, which made it difficult to use. We wanted to connect our Netflix account but couldn’t manage to do so.
They provide one complimentary bottle of water on arrival, though it isn’t replaced on the following days. Coffee capsules, however, are replenished daily.
Overall, we had a very comfortable stay and would recommend this hotel for both city breaks and business trips. It’s convenient, pleasant, and very well located. ☺️","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBdb4m0cun0bIvCKhGTKGwW&fid=0x0:0x253335b4d952ff92"],"When":"2025-12-4"},{"Name":"Sara_aluraifi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeFH6dzZjd_ZFLhXHZKibEzXEy8hWzFB4Qa7PutLe3CnO2G7yVfjd4VSabiCQwQYo5W-g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I recently stayed at the Marriott Hotel in Madrid. While my overall experience was pleasant, there are a few points worth mentioning that could help enhance the guest experience, especially for loyal Marriott members.||Upon check-in, I wasn’t acknowledged as a Silver Elite member, which was disappointing as Marriott hotels usually recognize their members upon arrival. It’s a small gesture but one that always makes a difference and reinforces loyalty to the brand.||The hotel’s location is excellent, and the room itself was newly renovated, spacious, and comfortable. However, I found it lacking in some basic amenities that are typically available in five-star hotels, such as cotton pads, shower caps, and other standard toiletries. Additionally, only one bottle of water was provided upon arrival, with no replenishment during the stay.||Breakfast was decent but somewhat limited in variety compared to other Marriott properties I’ve stayed at. Perhaps this is part of the local offering, but a bit more selection would elevate the overall experience.||In summary, the stay was good — the room and location were strong positives — but a few details and touches were missing to make it feel like the full Marriott standard I’ve come to expect as a loyal member who always chooses to stay within the brand wherever I travel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tobias","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJgTu6poJ-AjO8GWAuSvP26wHOqWzOXw3ByE0TxmLkU2PxyDQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Newly refurbished hotel just 5min walking to Plaza España. Next metro station just around the corner. Very clean and good service. Breakfast menu is very good and nothing is missing. The “city view” is not really worth it when you have a room at the wrong side of the hotel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew Teasdale","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVWN9gDsYMddBrUs4a1esfVlbd-V7VSaDYnPlFp-lC7pfdeOvJp=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"There's a management problem here. The staff were struggling. I reserved 2 rooms. They wouldn't let me bring but 1 family member to the lounge. Never experienced that before (I'm lifetime platinum with Marriott). Great location. Great rooms. But, I'm spending $3k, and get reprimanded because I want to bring my adult kids for a soda and a pastry? Really?","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"2016trav","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeWB0GIG9gGd6g9zDFXwjE9TRuKRtAO6HvwA5jEdK_CrOJXcVxp8esjQRYTFMjay2JK=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Overall, it was a good stay. There were some inconveniences: construction next to the hotel early in the morning. I called the front desk and was immediately moved to another room. Unfortunately, during the move to another room, the front desk staff loudly announced my room number, and as a solo traveler, that is a safety concern. But Angie, the front desk supervisor, immediately moved me to another room after I explained that I didn't feel safe. I was satisfied with the new room's location. But the experience left me feeling a bit uncomfortable and anxious throughout my stay. The hotel seems new, and the rooms are spacious for European standards and are about 10 minutes from Plaza España and the Gran Via.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"N","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJt-c_BXQeQ9w3AmcEl4WY89OpRgG3Z6URPmj_nLVdJZQ9WhQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Longterm, loyal Marriott member here.
One night stay - less than average experience for this tier of Marriott. Housekeeping has a negative attitude, and service is a hit-or-miss. I recommend the JW Marriott in Madrid if you want better luxury, service, and quality.

We stayed here one night before flying out after a long trip through Spain. When we went to turn down the blankets and sleep, we saw the bedsheet was dirty. The new bedsheet in our room had 3 stains, and we went down to inform the front desk at night when we first saw it. They switched our breakfast reservation from 19 Euros, to free and sent housekeeping to change the sheet. We were in the room as housekeeping performed this basic service. I was on the couch in the room and housekeeping literally chucked four pillows next to me. I was surprised they didn’t say excuse me, but I kept silent. Then they yanked off the sheets and threw them so violently at the couch I was on, half the blankets hit me on my shoulder and face. I was so incredibly exhausted that I just sat there silent and shocked. As they were about to leave, we informed them calmly that their behavior wasn’t kind or respectful and they really didn’t care.

We informed the front desk and they said sorry, but that was it.

Breakfast is worth it, and the service staff are kind and attentive. ***However*** I was very thorough in asking about lactose content in certain items and I believe I was misled about the lactose content in their brownies OR someone misplaced a different milk next to the Oat Milk sign, because I got sick after breakfast in a way that only happens with lactose.

Rosanna at the check-in reception was kind and welcoming! The check-in experience stands out as a highlight thanks to her.

Location is decent, but again, if you can afford it, go to the JW instead.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC4sDO2XE65UTa-TFF49Cl_&fid=0x0:0x253335b4d952ff92"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"david baker","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUkIL8sM_DHaV03N-UaCWbhegMQf9ddadyboTPXMbzUJtLo_ajx=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had A nice stay recently, the hotel is conveniently located by restaurants, bars, and shopping. The rooms were nice and spacious. The M lounge was very nice, the evening buffet was excellent..
Efren Was the best !!
He gave us great service everyday we were there and provided us with everything we needed, he was very professional & greeted us with a smile every night!
Hope to be back soon.","Images":null,"When":""}]

I thought this place offered great value for money.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tiana Aleksieva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV4hQUG4So1mH39BJu-3wqLopCVF4S_x7qbiXTpcaYn_RWTYIAnrA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Overall a nice experience in this really stylish hotel.

Our first stay here one year ago was really nice so we chose this hotel for our second trip to Madrid this year as well.
The lobby is really stylish, I love everything about the decorations and the atmosphere.
The rooms are really comfortable, with clean and nice bedding, spacious bathrooms and a lot of nice small hotel commodities such as combs, toothbrushes and shower caps as well as shampoo, conditioner and shower gel.

The only problem we had with the room was the really bad isolation. We could literally hear the conversation of my parents in the room next to ours. In addition, we could hear the water running every single time the people in the room above us went to the shower, wash their hands or use the bathroom.
One night we could hear our neighbours using the shower til 2 am which really disturbed our sleep and was pretty uncomfortable.

Overall, it’s a really nice hotel, everything except the noise was great. I see that a lot of people didn’t like the food, so I am glad I chose not to pay for food service there.

The location is fantastic, because you have a metro station 2 minutes away from you, you can walk to the city centre and there are a lot of convenience stores and restaurant in the area. The only advice I can give future guests is to buy earplugs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBpAsG_T56J1kBrbCJHWyQz&fid=0x0:0xf375980664b34d15"],"When":"2025-10-16"},{"Name":"Dan Fair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW2cTwZKYhyJGw3M3P9r8EKHdrlI8MkUY0KOXbrkr1psuKPP_46=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Wonderful location near many restaurants and shopping. Nice lobby with Complimentary juice. Rooms comfortable and spacious, great shower, comfortable bed. Complimentary Toothbrush & Comb etc. Excellent wifi. Reasonably priced minibar. Top notch breakfast with hige variety. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9fUqsOuElouDq1AOn6sfM&fid=0x0:0xf375980664b34d15"],"When":"2025-12-24"},{"Name":"Younes Najjaj","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVR0rjAsSnoOSuq7wsjlB6jvKnfF7o6eWoftEJJMDbogMtQmRMO=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Hello,

I stayed for 3 days, from the 25th to the 28th.
The hotel is nice, the breakfast is good, and the staff reception is excellent.

However, I encountered several issues: noise from the doors, people speaking loudly in the hallways as early as 6 a.m., and a lack of sound insulation in the rooms. We could also hear the taps from other rooms.

Lastly, there was an issue with dust. As I am allergic, I unfortunately developed eye problems due to dust in the pillows, which affected and disturbed my vision.

These are points that need improvement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rainy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWv_-252WxC5ORmzLAYX8OFfEkIoZF2_aBuIre1O6Qd4I4MQ_0=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lovely professional reception staff . We did arrive on a Saturday morning our flight left Gatwick at just after 6am which was a mistake as we could not get our room until 3pm. The reception staff were very good and explained everything in English to us that weekends could be busy as people staying longer.  The hotel is charming and vintage in its decor. The room was clean and lovely , the bed v comfortable . Also a mini bar. We were on the 8th floor and the balcony had a sheer drop, it was slopped towards the room and had no railings around it. There was a warning sign on door, not for those scared of heights !! But was lovely the only thing I would of liked would of been tea and coffee making facilities in the room and another chair on balcony so we could of sat together","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAm5i_QN1ZAd1BLQbPxBHw9&fid=0x0:0xf375980664b34d15"],"When":"2025-10-22"},{"Name":"Sheila Ellis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWAOBiHxQ9TSCtWEnRDm-hKbiY-zUgErpjfGxwnAHA5oKJ9hAG3bw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This is an "okay" hotel, but for me there are two significant drawbacks that guests need to be aware of: the deceptive climate control system and the noise.

There is NO individual air conditioning or heat unit in the rooms; the system is centralized for the entire hotel. You can control it in your room with that fake thermostat. BUT the unit is NOT in your room, so you are at the expense of what the hotel wants to do (heat, cold, or nothing - like at this time of the year). Maybe something common here, but it is awful. It took me 3 hot nights to realize there was something wrong with the unit. I checked in during a weather transition period, and the system was completely OFF!!! While the front desk staff was nice, their suggestion to simply open the window was highly inappropriate and completely missed the point. There are many reasons (which I shouldn't have to explain) why I will not open the window. I found no mention of this inconvenient centralized system on the hotel's website.

Additionally, the noise is a real problem, confirming other reviews. Soundproofing is extremely poor, you can hear conversations, TV shows, running water, etc from surrounding rooms very clearly.

The lack of climate control and the poor soundproofing severely impacted my stay. Book only if you can tolerate these issues.

*Lucky me, they gave me a fan. I had a fan in my hotel room so I can sleep comfortable 🙄","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Ruben Marquez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvqlvdnfWRlviRCsmIevQ1-3GXiqZ3-geUMjlg7GPShndbvw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Spent almost a week at this hotel and the experience from beginning to end was pleasant.  The hotel is located in a quiet and nice area with several bars around, a few bakeries and some stores. Just walking distance to gran via (30ish min).  Staff was really friendly and room super clean.  Bus stop is 1min walk.  Overall I’m happy with my experience there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"John Tran","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX3AJx_y7JvUT8KVa9vppvREqgnuv_2eQyGgzcbryKwpxYQxdq6=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"First of all, I want to say that the hotel is indeed a good location, somewhat quiet, etc. However, I am giving 1 star for a couple of reasons.

1. Bed bugs. I would’ve thought a hotel like this would do a better job of inspecting their furniture before and after their guests leave. We ended up finding like over 4 of them hidden in the seams of the mattress frame. My partner got bit over 7 or 8 times.

2. And now the meat of the complaint, how the situation was handled by management. When my partner got up in the middle of the night due to itchy bites, we saw a bed bug fall off of her and onto the bed. We took pictures of it and the blood stains on the sheets, which we were pretty sure were already there. That night we brought it up to the front desk clerk, and he gave us a new room and told us they’ll investigate in the morning. When it was morning, we asked the day shift clerk, Yosef, about it and he said that they found nothing and immediately denied that it was a bed bug when it obviously was. We double checked images on google and I even resorted to uploading the images we took to AI. What does he want? A scientist to confirm? We argued with him and he kept on denying the facts. He said that the bug was too big (the photo was zoomed in) and that there was just one bug (honestly fair I guess). He said it was some tree bug lol. He then try to convince us that we could’ve brought the bug over in a pretty condescending manner. It’s as if we were being discriminated for being Americans (though I get it). He also said if this was such a problem, we can pack our bags and go somewhere else. My partner spoke Spanish and when she translated to me that Yosef was denying our claims, I said “so he’s not believing that it’s a bed bug?” out loud. Yosef immediately directed us to the breakfast area so that other people won’t hear us. It was clear that he prioritized the hotel’s reputation than its guests. After we ate breakfast, we went to talk to him again. He proposed that we put our luggage on our beds in our new room to see if bugs come out. I thought this idea was absolutely ridiculous, and we didn’t go through with it. Looking back on it now, that probably would’ve had the bed bugs climb into our luggage. I really wasn’t convinced that it was our fault for bringing in the bed bugs, so when we went back to the room to get our luggage to move into the new room, we went to the extent of flipping the bed frame over. We found more bed bugs hidden in the seams of the frame. We even caught one in a glass cup. We came back to Yosef with more evidence and he started to panic. He grabbed a can of insecticide and we came back to the room with him. When he saw the bugs, it was then that it seemed to dawn on him that these were indeed bed bugs and that it’s the hotel’s fault for letting this infestation go this far. He then proceeded to spray the insecticide on the wheels of our luggage. Not once that he apologized for all of the denial and the unprofessionalism. In terms of compensation, the hotel washed our clothes and let us stay in the new room. In between all of this, was a lot of miscommunication such as him wanting us to go back to stay in the original room and that they would change the bed sheets but didn’t and changed the new room’s bedsheets instead. I’ll spare the details of that, but that was a lot of back and forth, nonproductive, and stressful.

I am incredibly surprised that a hotel with a lot of good reviews ended up being a terrible experience. I’m typically forgiving, but man, what a ridiculous and stressful time. If anyone has legal experience in Spain/EU, please let me know if we can do anything. I really wanted to get this over with so we can enjoy the rest of our vacation, so I didn’t look into that too much. This was our first impression of Madrid. But thankfully the rest of Madrid was amazing with its rich culture and terrific people. I told reception, who pretty much shrugged it off. It is difficult to prove you have been stolen from, but infuriating nonetheless.

I speak Spanish but my husband only speaks English, and I really appreciated how Jorge made sure to explain everything in English too so my husband could follow along. His customer service was outstanding, and if I come back to Madrid, I will definitely stay at the same hotel again because of Jorge.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tim M.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfXp6AJTvSiddTT16s9nQOV87nh_j3IB-bKWGsQZgSESrx9A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This hotel is a good 3 stars hotel. The hotel design was in a modern style, which is okay. I would personally recommend a painting or something to make it more special. The card everyday towards the end of the day lost its touch to the sensor so we had to change it everyday. The reception was actually quite helpful in explaining the centre of Madrid. The staff was nice. The rooms are also in this modern style. However, WARNING: if you came to Madrid to rest, this hotel is NOT for you. There is a night club across the road and everyday there is loud drunk men shouting until 4am, the windows in the hotel room are useless at blocking the noise. If you came to party, this is a perfect place. However the price for the hotel doesn’t match its quality. Over 1000 euros for 4 nights where you couldn’t sleep and when we asked a basic question to the reception staff, they looked confused as  if they never got this compliment. In general, it’s a good 3 star that costs like a 4 star hotel. Major bonus for this hotel being 10 minutes walking from Gran Via.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Pavel Beránek","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6M7VbPP5cHAyRqZmRxOBTpztdsXeNskuh-LJcqnS2fvqwxlre=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The hotel is in a good location, but the service was disappointing. The check-in process took 30 minutes, only for the receptionist to tell us that we had to wait until the afternoon for our room to become available. Later, when we returned, we were informed that they had no record of our reservation, so we had to go through the entire check-in process again.

Any requests at the reception had to be repeated two or three times before they were acknowledged. The room lacked a shoehorn and a toilet brush. We requested a toilet brush, but it was never delivered.

On a positive note, the housekeeping was at a high standard. The breakfast selection was rather limited but still tasty.

Overall, the experience was frustrating, and the service needs significant improvement.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dominic Barroga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaqVYzNAJ6YQ86212GAxakCPu2xL4qvcwO_jtAx_pVeNsGGQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Terrible wifi connection in the room I stayed in. Pitiusa","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKqUYzARr0rRfUeMRo4MtMq3R4GK3pKysSKVtWBfpltUiQh93U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The location is okay because it’s centrally located, but the surrounding area is a disaster. It’s truly shocking and unacceptable.

What’s even more frustrating is that the hotel management does absolutely nothing to improve the situation. If the back of the hotel — where the emergency exit is — looks like this, it raises serious concerns about the hygiene standards in the kitchen and the rest of the building. title: Hotel Riu Plaza España
address: Gran Vía, 84, Centro, 28013 Madrid
descriptions: Sleek property featuring dining, a rooftop bar & a seasonal outdoor pool, plus chic quarters.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicolas Lopes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJHNabeloDYywfmTIB9CRZLPFP-hneBnszLV7GUCjCGf703MKv-=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent stay at Riu Plaza España. Smooth check in, room service on point, the breakfast bar provided so many food options, a mimosa bar and great espresso coffee machines!

the food was very good,

title: Inhala Hotel Garden
address: C. de San Bernardo, 1, Centro, 28013 Madrid
descriptions: Stylish rooms in a high-end hotel featuring dining, a rooftop pool & meeting space.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Michelle Then","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUbuKZJ6GYFv_IwyaGdYnmYZWbcAvUq8pa58Tb1BAu-KUyH-_xR=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our stay at this hotel was truly unforgettable. We chose a spacious suite that was not only extremely comfortable but also beautifully arranged, offering a magnificent view that made every moment feel special. The room was spotless, fresh, and inviting, with thoughtful details that elevated our comfort throughout the stay.
One of the highlights was the hotel’s terrace, where we enjoyed dinner with breathtaking views over the city—an experience that perfectly combined ambiance and flavor. Another unique feature was the vertical garden, visible from the fourth floor, which added a touch of nature and artistry to the property.
The staff provided exceptional service—always kind, attentive, and genuinely polite, making us feel warmly welcomed. Breakfast was delightful, with a wide variety of delicious options to savor each morning.
We also noticed the area near the lobby, thoughtfully designed with chairs, coffee service, and tables, offering a comfortable space for guests who wish to relax or work.
The location was excellent! We felt safe walking around and discovered charming places nearby that enriched our stay. The combination of the suite’s breathtaking view, the terrace dining experience, the vertical garden, and the attentive service made our visit truly memorable. We would gladly return and highly recommend this hotel to anyone seeking both comfort and beauty during their travels.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adam Deveau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHUO2Epj-lYDjazfuSSerGuzKJvtcwCMAgwNkkXlQQLSrYzHWD=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"We were greeted by lovely staff and the check in was very easy. The room, however was quite unacceptable - we were the only room rented along our hallway as the other rooms were being completely gutted and renovated. We were woken up at 7:30am (2:30am our local time as this was our first stop on our vacation) by hammers, drills, and saws and multiple loud voices as they work was being done. The hallway was covered in dust, carpet was ripped up and windows to the hallway were wide open (it was 8 degrees in February) and our room heating could not keep up so our room was 15 degrees. This room should NOT have been rented at all in the first place and we feel insulted and very frustrated that it was. We paid extra for the premium room and it felt as though it was a cheap hostel at best. We did ask for a room change and were granted one. The room was smaller but the space much quieter. However the new room was not much better - the shower spit out brown, rust-coloured water, the towel racks were falling off the wall and the sink is about to fall off the wall as well. Very, very, very disappointing and shameful for what we paid (1024 CAD for 3 nights). Will leave reviews elsewhere as well so other travellers don’t have this experience","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA-CHP0S2JnJOfh24iz51Dl&fid=0x0:0x681001b2b33a25e9"],"When":"2026-2-21"},{"Name":"Zoelange Jeronimo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVwAXaPD4kXU_pZzNr7sLm9JSDDqcRtyMKwleroQ7P5ct8odtI=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our stay here was very pleasant but I really need to highlight the service in the rooftop restaurant and the food quality. All i can say is Wowwwww, everything was soo good, the food was insanely delicious, and they make you feel very special. I will definitely come back to this hotel but specially for the service the access to the rooftop and the 5 star restaurant they have on the top floor. Please 5 star to the chef, I don’t really know how this restaurant is not famous but it definitely deserves everyone to know about how good they are. Thank you Inhala to make us feel so good on our vacation!!!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Thebeholder Photographer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZJ5l2zYZ00s-z_TiZrS55zYYo3gOF4RTEfrB1E6kkA3lIsRo=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great location! R.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI3G1XZKhffF2z8461d-WvpPOYnLYCW1Blc9q8PxGeVQWKD_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"My boyfriend and I stayed here for a special occasion, but unfortunately the hotel did not acknowledge it, which was a little disappointing.

We booked a room with a patio and jacuzzi and really enjoyed both amenities. The bath bombs provided were a thoughtful touch we appreciated. However, we couldn’t get the remote pad for the jacuzzi to work, so the LED lights and settings weren’t functioning.

The biggest downside was that we woke up on our first morning to find the floor covered in ants. After looking around, we noticed a sticky residue behind the curtains near the garbage, which seemed to be attracting them. We reported it to the front desk, and although maintenance stopped by, the residue remained. Later, housekeeping came and mopped the area, but no spray or treatment was used. Unfortunately, the ants persisted throughout our stay, which was very frustrating, especially given the price of the room.

On a positive note, the location was excellent - right in the center, within walking distance of everything, and with the metro just around the corner.

Overall, while we loved the location and some aspects of the room, the lack of attention to cleanliness and maintenance left us disappointed.","Images":null,"When":""}]

September 2025.

I travel often and have stayed in many hotels, but this was by far the worst experience I’ve ever had. We booked a double room expecting a proper setup for two people. When we arrived, we were shocked to find a single bed pushed up against the walls, leaving only one narrow side to get in or out. This was completely impractical for two people and honestly unacceptable for a so-called double room.

When we spoke with the management, they were unhelpful and dismissive. Instead of correcting the mistake or offering a reasonable solution, they told us we would have to pay more money just to get a bed that two people could actually use comfortably. That is outrageous.

I’ve never been to a hotel where a “double room” meant crawling over each other to get in and out of bed. The fact that management refused to help and instead tried to upsell us made the whole experience even worse.

If you value comfort, honesty, and basic customer service, do yourself a favor and avoid this hotel at all costs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna Abdulina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWSNgTn1-hNBJueKVosgoX8G4T2mdRShg3ebZ1ShDBKNx66Fgc0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A really lovely little hotel for its price! We had our wedding in Madrid and chose this hotel as our venue—and it was, without a doubt, the best decision we made. Everything about the experience was absolutely perfect, from the elegant setting to the incredible staff who made the day flow seamlessly.
A very special thank you to Carlota, Javi and Sheylla who were truly exceptional. From the very first meeting, they made us feel confident and cared for. Their professionalism, warmth, and eye for detail ensured that our day was not only beautiful but completely stress-free. They thought of everything—we felt like we were in the best hands throughout the entire process.
Our guests were blown away by the location, the food, and the overall atmosphere. The views over Madrid were stunning, the ceremony setup was gorgeous, and the reception was pure magic.
This place will always hold a special place in our hearts. We couldn’t have dreamed of a better spot to start this new chapter in our lives. Highly, highly recommended for weddings or any special celebration.
With endless gratitude,
Chloe & Daniel","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQiTcz1LG8vSAkjenvOL3q&fid=0x0:0xcf29d0a106fe8a5"],"When":"2025-9-28"},{"Name":"A Rita P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8TesHr5E0TtBd0wXNbrr3AUuzddgnSkHVh-Ter_qZxnwSc_c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"The hotel has a good location on Gran Vía, but there are many better options nearby for similar prices.

I was woken up every morning by extremely loud construction noise coming from the room above mine, which lasted all day. I requested a room change, but this was denied. I was told that the noise was due to renovation works, with walls being broken. At no point before my stay was I informed that the hotel was undergoing construction, which is unacceptable.

The beds are very small and uncomfortable. The bathroom was poor. No water pressure in the shower, unstable water temperatura, and no toilet brush.

The hotel is very misleading. The lobby looks elegant and gives the impression of a refined hotel, but the reality is that it is very old and poorly maintained. The rooms are a complete scam.

I also visited the rooftop terrace, which the reception described as a highlight of the hotel, but access to the upper level to see the city lights was denied due to “maintenance.”

To make matters worse, at check-out no one asked how my stay had been or showed any concern about the issues experienced.

I visit Madrid several times a year, and this was one of the worst hotels I have ever stayed in. I would not recommend it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"FlexGirl58","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QcoKrjftg2H5FSPDgamEji1HcAj6KJIMYEaB28IfM5URISpFokTGJ4TKCMmdB7Et-p_0g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We went to the lobby for drinks the day after Christmas. Great for people watching as they pass.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ian_dempster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfndCAq-uxCGOZMI7LGh3BMpWGEbPhcwmoTu71Rum6FWmIVCdty-rocNNYz1q8SL9qX-Q=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"This is a classic hotel on Gran Via with a most beautiful foyer and ground floor lounge. Bed was firm and pillows quite rigid but the room was of a good size with plenty storage. title: Pestana CR7 Gran Vía Madrid
address: Gran Vía, 29, Centro, 28013 Madrid
descriptions: Fashionable hotel with a pizzeria, a rooftop bar & a sports bar, plus a gym & breakfast.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Mehdi brahimi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAuiNDDX7RaKSNpEwuh1YRC-6-GoAX6HwhRTMLEXprdx63Uw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful stay at this hotel from January 30th to February 2nd, and the experience exceeded our expectations.

The welcome was warm from the very beginning, and throughout the stay the staff were attentive and caring. The rooms were very comfortable, and despite facing Gran Vía Avenue, they were perfectly quiet, allowing us to rest very well.

The breakfast was good, offering everything essential to start the day properly.

A special mention to the reception staff — Naria and David — who were extremely kind, helpful, and always ready to assist us with a smile. The concierges at the entrance were also very friendly and service-oriented. The breakfast team was equally pleasant and attentive.

The hotel is very clean and perfectly located, making it an ideal place to stay when visiting the city.

Overall, this hotel is definitely worth the stay, and we would gladly return in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ebru Han","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfMbR0uPAmK0h2MFPS-60tih3NSJlDlEKmpAUz0p5SeV2rXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We received a very warm welcome upon arrival at the hotel. title: Boutique Urban Madrid Génova
address: C. de Almagro, 10, Chamberí, 28010 Madrid
descriptions: Relaxed, modern rooms in a straightforward hotel offering free Wi-Fi, plus meeting rooms.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Shmuel Salama","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVSCYFNmpF-RNjNdeIoNoYp7bCYqOGRlcnybn9ZGYfWXLr5Xo-2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After booking rooms at this hotel, I read the reviews on Google and was quite worried, since the reviews there were not good at all. Still, I decided not to change my reservation — and I don’t regret it one bit. Everything written in the negative reviews is completely untrue and doesn’t reflect the reality of the hotel. This is a high-quality hotel at a very reasonable price.
Everything was excellent — the location is in the center of Madrid, the lobby is pleasant and well-organized, the reception staff are kind, everything is always clean and tidy, there are three elevators, and the rooms are neat, clean, and very well equipped. Housekeeping was great — they cleaned and arranged the room every day and replaced the towels.
The beds are tidy, comfortable, and clean; the bathroom and toilet are modern and pleasant; there’s a bright window, and the overall feeling is very comfortable.
It is also very quite and not crowded. You can sleep quietly and peacefully.
It’s not a luxury hotel, but it’s definitely everything you need for a trip to Madrid — and all at a great price. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessica May","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUsxc6XJr0G6yX1c5ksCbmi53UhB4OgSassbWl7cYpv3hpASLmm=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately I have to give this hotel 1 star even though the lady at the reception desk was incredibly nice and polite. This place goes under several different names!

We had a terrible experience at this property and are still waiting on a refund — the hotel is simply not communicating.

When we arrived, we immediately noticed bugs crawling out of a hole in the wall right next to the bed. We were on the 6th floor, and the bugs were coming from inside the wall — not from outside or because of food. We have photos and videos showing this. It was clearly a maintenance problem.

There was also a strong, unpleasant smell in the apartment — like smoke, mold, or chemicals — and I ended up having a rash, irritated eyes, and a full allergic reaction. I couldn’t sleep until 5:30 a.m. because I felt so uncomfortable and unwell.

At around 3:00 a.m., we were also woken up by a loud party or argument in the neighboring apartment — the walls are paper thin. We barely slept at all.

We went to reception in the morning to explain everything. No one spoke English, and they told us the manager wouldn’t be available until Monday. I tried speaking in Spanish, but we didn’t get any help. We were offered another room, but after everything — especially the allergic reaction — we didn’t feel safe staying any longer and left.

We later found many reviews on Google and other sites complaining about the exact same things: bugs, noise, smells, and no help from staff. Unfortunately, none of those reviews showed up on Booking.com, or we never would have booked it.

We’ve tried reaching out about a refund for the remaining nights — we even said we’re happy to pay for the first night — but the hotel has refused to communicate or take any responsibility. We’ve now contacted Booking.com, and we’re disputing the charge with our credit card.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Amirhossein Kazemipour","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVZw5oqt5QbvaRlCfJPl649XNlSQcEfM5qp-clPOOalXbGn8asw6g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Our stay at this hotel was unfortunately below expectations.

The receptionist struggled with English, making communication difficult. The room was not clean and felt very outdated, with items like the sofa and walls in poor condition and clearly in need of renovation. The soap dispenser in the bathroom didn’t work, and there was no hairdryer in the room. Despite requesting one, the staff couldn’t provide it. Additionally, the environment was very noisy, particularly due to the cleaning staff making loud noises, which made it hard to relax.

Overall, the hotel needs significant improvements, especially in cleanliness, functionality, and soundproofing, to provide a comfortable stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rohit Jagtiani","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWq8uOSjmXctMrAqA_lUjrgyyGGYvCwfvGK-PnV-LcEsJouDEql=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Fake marketing, this not a boutique hotel is more like a cheap hostal overpriced by location. Ac was not working and I would like to recommend them to use softener whenever they clean any cloth, towels were hard like a rock and bed sheets like razor.

Another negative point is the reception, lack of sympathy whenever anybody checks in is like a burden for them.","Images":null,"When":""}]

My heart belongs in Madrid so who knows - I might be back!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Imfranco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QfsnvlNO8mgROWsxiGYBmc-FMApm47le01WrNgEyYNYqUPw1j7nx-COV-HLlhXF8VUXQQ=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I booked Urso Hotel & Spa through my Chase Sapphire Reserve points, part of the Edith Collection, which promises early check-in (upon availability), late check-out, an upgrade, $100 credit, and a welcome amenity. On paper, it sounded like a perfect five-star experience. In reality, it was anything but.||We arrived at 10:00 a.m. and were told there were no rooms available—and no idea when one might be ready. Fair enough, but when I politely asked which room category we’d been assigned, I was curtly told there would be no upgrade because the hotel was “full.” The receptionist’s only suggestion? “You can sit in the lobby or go out for a walk.” I asked if we could at least have breakfast while waiting and was told, “Of course—but you’ll have to pay.” A warm welcome indeed.||When our room was finally ready, we discovered it was a handicap-accessible room, complete with a shower that flooded the entire bathroom floor. So much for comfort. When I asked to move, I was told there were “no other rooms available”—unless I wanted to pay €600 extra for a suite. The so-called “gift amenity” was a single chocolate, the same one given during turndown service. I’ve received more thoughtful welcomes at mid-range hotels, let alone at supposed five-star properties.||Breakfast the next morning was chaos. The staff looked half-asleep; my eggs Benedict never arrived even after 30 minutes and three follow-ups. The spa? A single large jacuzzi pool, no sauna, no steam bath—hardly the “spa experience” they advertise.||Urso may have the decor of a boutique luxury hotel, but the service standard felt more like a tired three-star property. I was shocked to have been charged for a coffee pod (7.5 euros) in such a hotel, so be aware that even coffee pods are not complimentary.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sally7866","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeFH6dzZjd_ZFLhXHZKibEzXEy8hWzFB4Qa7PutLe3CnO2G7yVfjd4VSabiCQwQYo5W-g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"Having booked a spa day at your hotel, our experience began poorly with coffee orders being completely mishandled multiple times. The initial drinks were wrong; the second batch was clearly made by an inexperienced barista, and though the third round was drinkable, the coffees were lukewarm at best. Following the spa, my daughter and I dined in the lounge/bar adjacent to reception, where the service deteriorated to an unacceptable level. Staff entirely ignored the tables; we had to repeatedly flag them down just to place or reorder drinks. After ordering a starter to share and identical mains, we were subjected to an outrageous wait of nearly 30 minutes before all dishes were brought out simultaneously. The starter arrived cold, and one of the mains was incorrect. After waiting another 22 minutes, a replacement main arrived stone cold except for the fries. Despite informing a waiter before eating, no apology, offer of compensation, or even acknowledgment was made. When we requested not to be charged for the incorrect cold main, we were flatly refused. A female staff member claimed to be a manager, and when we insisted speaking to genuine management, the F&B Manager Matias arrived only to deny any responsibility or rectification. Our request to escalate to the Hotel Manager was also denied on the grounds of him being “too busy,” with Matias claiming he had consulted the Hotel Director to enforce payment for the substandard meal. Matias later compounded the distress by blatantly lying, twisting our words, and fabricating a version of events designed to avoid accountability by saying it was the “hotel direction that we should pay”. This culminated in an unwarranted threat of police involvement, forcing my daughter to call the authorities. The police instructed us to file a formal complaint, which we did. Matias refused to translate his Spanish complaint form, and when pressed, his verbal explanations were evasive and dishonest. We view this behavior as a gross betrayal of customer trust and a stark violation of basic hospitality principles. It is not about the €20.00 charge it is about the principle. Dishonest, ill-trained, and argumentative staff with no sense of service or integrity have left us appalled. We have escalated this complaint to CEO Victor Vacas and the hotel’s stakeholders via LinkedIn, as this level of ineptitude and deceit is utterly unacceptable. There are countless far superior dining options in Madrid. We will certainly not recommend this hotel to anyone and expect a full investigation and an appropriate response to restore customer faith.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David Simon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUqayporMY0rOKbzl4lBXymcJPYt1O5Q5q-L2VnzpV25eJNnAI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A uniquely charming and elegant hotel in the midst of the City. Five Stars!!","Images":null,"When":""}]
