address: C. de Canillas, 2, Chamartín, 28002 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Dy Harrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL78JjJHnoD3a6DV7wLpmHDOX4bGVHG0mHMx2rnwaajtiSIJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I didnt check the reviews until after it was booked. I only stayed one night before heading to the airport. The host was brief and direct. But the space was fine. The bedroom has a lock on the door. The room seemed clean enough. The locker was big enough for my backpack. I didnt use the shower as I had to rush to the airport but it was a great location as the 200 airport bus is next door which gets you to the airport in 19 minutes for €1.5. I had some good pizza and coffee in the neighbourhood the night before. Bathrooms are only on the first floor but they were clean. For the price and location it was good for a short trip with only a backpack.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"emma kiddie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJU1_5wBlIMPaWjGjtMsW4fVvYdQXN7kQthWuEntC3DxwWPqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This is not a luxury hotel but it is not a nightmare experience either like some of the other reviews seem to say, so I will give my honest review of the place and try to address most of the points I see people talking about:

My friend and I (both women) stayed in the 6-bed female only dorm for 5 nights, 4 out of 5 nights we had the room to ourselves. I imagine that is in part due to all the negative reviews of this place online.
The room itself has a locking door and we were given the key, and we had small private lockers inside the room, and we never felt in danger or at risk of being robbed. The room was clean on arrival and beds comfy, and the room had AC which was a plus.
The hostel street door was open most of the day and evening while the host is awake and working, but I can assure you it is closed and locked late at night, and we had to let ourselves in with our key which was provided.
We felt that the common area (kitchen/dining) and bathrooms are very small and awkward, and there are no toilets on the upper floor where the bedrooms are. The showers were basic, adequate and clean but the layout is awkward as well. Very small and you get water all over the floor.
We also had problems with the host, who was very rude and unfriendly, he speaks no English and even my friend who is fluent in Spanish had a hard time communicating with him. One night we were trying to sleep in our room around 2:30AM and heard strange loud noises in the kitchen downstairs, and we found the host in there obviously drunk and cooking food, with no regard for the sleeping guests despite signs all over the place requesting guests to be quiet after 11PM.
Also, the host insisted on coming into our room while we were still sleeping to “clean” which was very annoying, but when he entered the room all he did was open the windows and leave. The room was not actually cleaned for our whole stay.
In addition, he was not willing to chat or offer suggestions of places to eat, things to do etc. unlike  most hosts I’ve stayed with in other places. We were very disappointed by his poor attitude.
I would say this place is worth it for the money if you don’t mind the lack of finesse of the place, my friend and I paid about 190$ Canadian for 5 nights which I consider a great price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"A R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXexqrQytmFARpUb9yrxBmhUB14wxDsL_BNYp7trj8iur_ooQQ8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Get what you pay for.  Luckily I got a room to myself (4 bunks)
Bathrooms were on a deferential floor 😒
Other than that, very very basic, ideal for financially limited backpackers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sapphire Carter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXv5xchWoIn_LHizm0XqKg10Y73E-D4ONGX6BVYC9TtUvKLW1x8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They provide more than just the basics. They give you a clean towel and all the lockers have keys to lock. Very helpful as  I did not have my own lock or towel. The staff were very friendly and made sure to put us in seperate gender rooms which I appreciated. The rooms are a bit small and you have limited space to put your bags but it is manageable. The showers were always warm and there is even body wash and shampoo in there too. There are plenty of sinks and toilets. Did not have any of the bad experiences mentioned here and did not at any point feel like my things would be stolen. title: Gran Central Suites
address: C. de las Minas, 12, Centro, 28004 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Soheyla Heydari","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKGgk9sqda1YzrvX8pf_Qfv5sUoWpxrn8FVaXol_YFZBCF_Cw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highly recommended!
Cleanliness is the most important thing for me when choosing a hotel, and this place absolutely met my expectations. The room was spotless, and the sheets smelled fresh and newly washed.
I traveled in winter, and the room was warm and very comfortable. There is also air conditioning available for summertime.
The staff were polite and friendly, and I honestly didn’t notice anything negative during my stay.
Overall, everything was great, and I would happily stay here again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Vaidile Jan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoOU6fXtbJKEg8Yly1VChFAZgs3i7yZJDIzRGDop1bRXcGCgv_XQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Wi-Fi is not working at all, and the staff just reads messages without any response which is why I am posting this review.

The apartment is average, it wouldn’t be so bad if attention to small details were given, as many of the essentials don’t work properly.

The kitchen is missing essentials, such as a spatula for cooking.

The shower runs out of warm water very quickly, so only one person can use it at a time. There is also very little space to store essential items.

The bedroom area is nice, apart the door that is very hard to shut, and the location is great.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"yeohk479","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QcAMX6x1kyyC4a8uKPBZCeWlT90KjmNFkgsk2nwAxhNYMl35txt0LKhr7WJeqrhDy9dMA=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We stayed at one bedroom apartment for family of four. We stayed at second floor and there was a lift to get up there.   We had two bright windows/ balconies overlooking the alley which is bright and airy.   The apartment equipped with a kitchen and everything we needed.  It is a good value for the amenities and location!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marcelo Borges","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW6sGVgI9c4X-V1EB_bo7x_fMQKmp9Bz3xc41GDJNzZ9Ndv9Lbfcw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The hotel is located in an excellent area, close to several shopping centers, markets, convenience stores, and the Metro station (Noviciato) and tourist attractions. Our reception was quick and friendly, and in our room we found everything we needed: a good bed, clean towels, appliances such as a two-burner electric stove, refrigerator, microwave, Nespresso coffee machine, toaster, electric kettle, iron, hairdryer, sink, kitchen utensils, closets, safe, a shower stall with excellent water temperature, a quiet and safe room. Everything was perfect. I recommend it and would return again. Congratulations to the management. My tip: Don't miss visiting the medieval city of Toledo - just take the Metro line 2 Red to Noviciato Station and after 3 stops get off at Sol station, then take the Metro line 1 Blue to Valdecarros Station and after 4 stations get off at Atocha station, at this station buy a train ticket to the final station in Toledo (on this route the cost per person for a round trip to Noviciato station will be EUR 26.65 per person).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCWHNZlpgJr_IfsmpgqN7Bk&fid=0x0:0x17aede9a92806a0e"],"When":"2025-12-1"},{"Name":"Antoine","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2J3XDPLvCm-RBmqOrmNqtSuG-hnIPBSPWcEnH26cZOH5F3Kg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I can’t recommend this hotel at all. For €200 a night, it was a major disappointment.

Main issues:
- Room décor feels like an office/warehouse: fire extinguishers, signage, odd layout.
- No real windows: they open onto a shared ledge used by other rooms, with fully frosted glass.
- Cleaning supplies stored in the living area.
- Sofa looks questionable.
- Frequent Wi-Fi problems with almost no support.
- Weak security: just a basic 4-digit code, no individual key cards.
- No daily room cleaning, despite being presented as a hotel.
- Very small water heater: two showers = one cold shower.

Only positive: the room (aside from the sofa) was fairly clean.

Overall: feels like a building converted into apartments and rented as “hotel rooms” without any real care for guest experience. Definitely not worth the price.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Rasim Yildiz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWZIqID782Es5zwKoOMtphG64N5GarUP9roukxiisWYOVwGuFM_=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"We stayed at the hotel for four nights in a 'small 1 bedroom apartment' situated on the ground floor.

We found out that the Gran Central Suite office was in a different building than the apartments and suites. Additionally, our room had two windows facing the courtyard, which were covered with white film sheets, making it difficult for daylight to penetrate effectively. As a result, the room remained quite dim during the day, giving it a twilight-like atmosphere.

There were some discrepancies between the photos of the room on hotel’s website and the actual room we stayed in. For instance, the shower space was so small that it made taking a comfortable shower quite challenging. The overall width of the bathroom was also quite small.

When we first entered into the apartment, we discovered that the bathroom sink was blocked, and the safe was locked. Although the hotel staff resolved these issues after we informed them, it took some time.

The hotel location was very convenient for reaching Gran Via Street and there were cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets nearby. Most tourist attractions were located within walking distance, and the household appliances in the apartment were sufficient for our needs.

I’ll stay in the same area if I visit Madrid in the future, but I won't prefer to stay at the same hotel (due to its overpricing for such small size apartment located at the corner of ground floor).

p.s. I couldn’t see any lift in the building. We didn’t need as the apartment was located on the ground floor.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAOzqSznwZleZLWTJNPVGOF&fid=0x0:0x17aede9a92806a0e"],"When":"2025-10-19"},{"Name":"Sebsdad","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QeFH6dzZjd_ZFLhXHZKibEzXEy8hWzFB4Qa7PutLe3CnO2G7yVfjd4VSabiCQwQYo5W-g=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"I was in Madrid for three nights so fancied a a bit more space and self-sufficiency than you get in a hotel, I got exactly what I wanted.||I booked through Expedia (can’t remember why) and the room descriptions there don’t quite match the website so I wasn’t 100% sure what I was getting. I appear to have had a compact / economy one bedroom apartment with sofa bed, and it was perfect. Small lounge and kitchenette, a table to eat at or work from, small shower room and a bedroom with a fairly small, but perfectly comfy double bed.||The only windows were frosted for privacy as they overlooked other rooms, not having a view wasn’t an issue for me, but could bother some people. ||There is no lift so you might want to request a room on a lower floor if you’d prefer not to climb stairs.||Check in was fine. I’d received an email containing an instruction to call them when I got off the plane, there was no answer so I was a little concerned, but on arrival at reception someone was there to meet me and get me sorted very efficiently.||Problem with the WiFi on the first night which was a bit of a pain, but this was sorted the next day so can’t complain.||All in all, I feel like I got good value and would happily use again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"colinc3","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QejddW0yoGeT8LnCjh-OGQgsf6YKqhof3HZA5-um4yCkQej85oCdMUmKPJmnowcu5Ag5w=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"These are self contained apartments in traditional Spanish buildings in a great location. ||However ….. they are not as nice as shown on the pictures and the maintenance is poor. Bedroom door would not close due to poor fitment and bathroom door would only close if repeatedly slammed.  Sofa bed is really uncomfortable with metal frame felt throughout making for a poor nights sleep. |Cleaner was banging door 15 mins prior to having to vacate the room and when I pointed this out to her she should at me in Spanish !! (Not something I would expect from an establishment looking for tourist to stay). |Also cleanliness of apartment would be described as fair/poor, I even found a previous guests toothbrush under the bathroom sink. Shower head was hanging off the wall due to poor upkeep and bathroom mirror was also in poor condition needing replaced. ||Great area of Madrid to stay in with plenty of local cafe/restaurants in the area. Gran Via is a pleasant 10 mins walk from the apartment and it’s also approx 5 mins walk from the tram station if like us arriving from the airport.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Far Home Bernabeu
address: C. de las Mercedes, 13, Tetuán, 28020 Madrid
descriptions: Straightforward dorms & private rooms in a casual hostel offering a guest lounge & free Wi-Fi.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Soban A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKeOCD5ex2KLzYXQSxzif2_MHnIoCNz5DhmMWLlmgs4s2Vvu-s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We stayed at this hotel for about 4 nights. Check-in was smooth and the staff were friendly and welcoming. We don’t speak Spanish, but they communicated with us in English without any issues, which we really appreciated.

We did ask for an early check-in (1–2 hours earlier), but no rooms were available at the time. That said, they offered free luggage storage since we arrived early, which was helpful. One thing to note is that this place is mostly a bed and breakfast, and the private rooms are located in a separate building next door.

The breakfast buffet costs €8 per person per day, but we didn’t try it. The building where our room was located has a shared kitchen and a small elevator, which was convenient.

Our room was quite small. It had a small sink and a microwave, and towels were provided. The bathroom and shower were very tight—so tight that you’re basically touching the walls while showering, which we didn’t love. Housekeeping was only every 3 days, which could definitely be improved. There wasn’t much space around the bed at all. The room also had a TV, though we didn’t use it.

We were on the second floor, and our window faced the back alley. This ended up being the biggest downside. Almost every night between 1–3 am, we were woken up by the garbage truck servicing the dumpsters below. On two other nights, there were groups of people drinking and talking loudly in the alley, which also woke us up.

One thing worth mentioning is that the listing mentioned coffee and tea being provided, but that wasn’t entirely accurate. Only hot water and tea bags were available in the main building (where reception is). There was a coffee machine, but you had to pay for coffee.

On the positive side, the place felt safe, and access seemed well-controlled—no random people hanging around. The location is a big plus: close to many attractions but still away from the more chaotic areas. Just be aware that the hotel is located down a short alley, which is a bit steep and might be challenging for some people.

Overall, decent stay with a great location, but the room size and noise at night were definite drawbacks.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSEyYqkQz0p1ouqnfjcErT&fid=0x0:0x96a6494a6094e305"],"When":"2025-12-28"},{"Name":"santiago Uzal Sanchez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWubyQ0BW7svlteGWP1Jd21b8GC9yA74XpA4z38LCaT27TU9xM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Location is great, rooms acceptable. Room service is every 3 days.
In my last day I was sick and took a bit longer to check out, I received a visit ti my room, the receptionist, Omar, who was quite rude claiming to empty the room immediately and that I would need to pay an extra fee (that I of course paid). I would not recommend this accommodation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard Lorincz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQ2eouFobyhk1qCN7sBceKDs7U-oCl_f8FurEuefLMdk2zeg0n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"The place is nice, full of young energy, everything is different color, and the location is pretty good.

So the place is good, but it is still a hostel. I booked a 4 beds room, I got 2 roommates, so we had 3 of us. We turned off the lamp around 11:15, but one of my roommate is went to crazy. He coughed, farted, snoored, mastur..... (no, I am not joking), and made many other noises that a human can produce. I barely slept 5 hours, and for the morning, I started to cough too.

It is not the hostel fault, I know that, I just would like to tell you, it is Madrid. Big city, with many different people, and it is a gambling. The price is good, but think twice it is worth it for you, because if you invest a little bit more money for your stay, you can get an enough good PRIVATE room.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAH140KLhaHt8kIvFqs9Myl&fid=0x0:0x96a6494a6094e305"],"When":"2025-11-15"},{"Name":"June Ano","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ2J9JyaOXHpd4DgINT6zrRU804NfL96Yam0TQZee6s2gjeig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Room are comfortable, staff is very friendly. There are a lot of common areas to relax in or work.
Walls are thin so take earplugs if you're sensitive to noise.
One suggestion would be adding a small shelf in the bathroom to have some space to put toiletries (room 406)
Great place","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Adrian De Michele","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJpev0QLREXhgTJp42aIFB5DTvEIalS8GOfSS4jWFZDkEUK5g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Bed had stains and hair in it when we got there. Air conditioning did not work so it was either too hot or too cold. Laundry service did not do a good job as the dryer took two cycles to dry our clothes (double the price $$).","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sonja Blessing Hurt","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX54-GPVlnUwIN4WnGsgFiE7rdFKqMuJk91bxNdEkHEbnp7uvtF=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My favorite thing about this place is that it is less than 2 blocks from the Estrecho metro station!

It’s decorated in a fun way and there is 24 hour service at the desk. It was perfect for our short stay in Madrid!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeremy Lim","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUrc1Ud0khZyXU0C0tbctyuaBLhUoJQiepCDtbzj8M2mEPjfP8i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent location. Got an offer and paid 19 euros for a one night stay in a 4 room. Very well organised, counter staff are here overnight, so I had no issues even though I arrived at 1+am. They allowed guests to leave their luggage in the luggage room till evening if necessary to accommodate storage. Would recommend.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCzqPy17Ez9kqShfZ0G_N91&fid=0x0:0x96a6494a6094e305"],"When":"2025-9-1"},{"Name":"Leigh McCarthy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWOKibzfoWHWSRx6ZIM3NH2WsUV9ZE4YVbl_Yfqaw1_TZNSvyZh=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We enjoyed a 3-night stay in an Economy Double Room, Private Bathroom from July 10 - 13. Being located just minutes away from Estrecho metro station was one of the best things about this hotel, as were its proximity to shops and restaurants was great. I would definitely recommend this hotel and would stay here again.","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Dear Hotel Madrid
address: Gran Vía, 80, Centro, 28013 Madrid
descriptions: Unfussy rooms & suites in an unpretentious hotel with a restaurant/bar & a plunge pool on the roof.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Jiří Hruška","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXAu-7M8PPqeCO6KmF2fAi1oakzkabfXrXBNBEv9rNJ4mFF-Hiz=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The hotel made a very good impression on us. Everything is perfectly fine – the rooms are clean, the environment is pleasant, and the overall atmosphere of the hotel is calm and relaxing. The staff is kind, helpful, and always willing to assist.

I would especially like to praise the waiter Jorge. He was very professional, friendly, and always smiling. He served us willingly, helped us choose from the menu, and thanks to him we felt truly welcome. This kind of attitude is not very common today, and we really appreciated it.

The only small downside is that the air conditioning in our room is probably not working properly, so the air feels heavy all the time. If this issue were fixed, everything would be absolutely perfect.

Overall, we are satisfied and we enjoyed our stay.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Senica Raymundo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLMD7j-TCJrmH9h2YI0svS0zbNwjWbhSxuwBFUofgGMPpQbGw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I loved my stay at Dear Hotel Madrid. The location is absolutely perfect—right in the city center, with restaurants and shopping areas just steps away. There’s even a metro station literally right outside the hotel, which made getting around incredibly easy.
The hotel is very clean, and the lobby always smelled fresh and welcoming. Our room was cleaned daily without us even having to ask, which I really appreciated. All the amenities needed for a comfortable stay were available, and everything felt well thought out.
The staff were warm and welcoming overall. A special mention goes to April in the breakfast area—she was consistently courteous, attentive, and kind to guests, which made mornings even more pleasant.
I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend Dear Hotel Madrid to anyone visiting the city.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hanchao Wang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXD8ct14XUn94Gd8Ca3bwYyEnYI6-cv_jN_oSiKqi_xcu1J6PGa=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great stay at Dear Hotel Madrid. The location is unbeatable—right on Gran Vía and within walking distance to everything we wanted to see. One of the highlights was the breakfast; the selection was fresh and high-quality, providing the perfect start to our busy days. A special thank you to Esther at the front desk. She was very helpful and provide us with clear, reliable information. Highly recommend this hotel for its service and convenience!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kernjeet S Nangpal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXoim6nK1_o_tZeDWuhbmf0Y8_WUdSqoABg1G2xmHxf8eMKLAQc=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a wonderful two-night stay at Dear Hotel, made truly special by the incredible service from Gianmarco.

He was kind, thoughtful, and always available whenever we needed anything. He went above and beyond to help us secure tickets to see Real Madrid, putting in extra time and effort to research the best options for us.

Gianmarco’s warmth and dedication made our time in Madrid unforgettable. We’re so grateful for his outstanding service!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"irina putintseva","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLpPZHf-RJEeHurNq0n-JiBVhscOhqhMxjHjHH243sBK7MEmA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We arrived in Madrid yesterday with my husband and our 7-year-old son, and this was our first stay at Dear Hotel Madrid. Absolute delight.

We have a stunning room on the 12th floor with extraordinary views. Five windows in the room give an almost 360-degree panorama of Madrid, truly unforgettable.

The breakfasts are wonderful, and Jorge, our waiter in the restaurant, is a real gift of fate. Friendly, attentive, and genuinely caring. The level of service throughout the hotel is outstanding.

Thank you to the entire team. Special respect to the reception staff Beatriz, you are fantastic. We are continuing to enjoy every moment of our stay in this beautiful place.

The hotel location is perfect, right in the very heart of Madrid.

We will definitely be coming back again and again. Thank you for everything.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA_ELMaLlcEhVdKyTB1mFVd&fid=0x0:0x8353dfa42ff002c9"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Roel Bul","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXEFFkz0zgDSkWmuG3FfuHZ5rMptiZO8-b-13nU6M13IQtaGHNq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The location is great for visiting all highlights. Lot of places on walking distance and metro entrance in front of the hotel.
Personnel is always friendly (Beatrice, Adrian).
Sometimes you hear the noise from the street a bit.
We did not take the breakfast, so can't say anything about that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"June Yan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUPbAddRX-N1sYDax9yUw8ZKTX0qnwaSU_zuZiRNe2G6dE4UQKA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We arrived at Dear Hotel quite late, close to 1am and were informed that our room was unavailable due to unexpected maintenance work. While this could have been stressful, the team handled it incredibly well. They had already arranged accommodation for us at Hotel Vincci Vía 66, just a 2 minute walk away. The staff were very apologetic and offered us complimentary breakfast and a room upgrade for the next day, which we really appreciated.

The following morning, we had breakfast around 9:45 am and by just after 11 am, our room at Dear Hotel was ready. We were upgraded to a suite, and it was absolutely beautiful. It featured a four-poster king-size bed, gorgeous views over Madrid, and was on a high floor (12th), which made it feel extra special. They also surprised us with a complimentary bottle of wine to make up for the inconvenience.

The rooftop and pool area was a nice touch. The location couldn’t be better, Plaza de España metro station is literally right at the hotel’s doorstep, making it extremely convenient to explore the city. There was also a charming Christmas market at Plaza de España that added to the festive atmosphere.

A special mention to Elena at the front desk and the rest of the team for being so accommodating, friendly, and professional throughout our stay. Despite the initial hiccup, we had a truly lovely time and would definitely come back again!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBaHVi0hTEz3KvGQdNYTbwT&fid=0x0:0x8353dfa42ff002c9"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Mona Mahmoud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLrARBnhNbMKmT-H8_4BItkm04UtWaSA4oCMroBpeBAtvbkxw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a great experience at Dear Hotel. Breakfast was very nice and well organized, and the service was excellent.
I would especially like to thank Maria, who was our server during breakfast — she was very kind, attentive, and always smiling. She really made our mornings pleasant.
Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""}]

title: Only YOU Boutique Hotel
address: C. del Barquillo, 21, Centro, 28004 Madrid
descriptions: High-end boutique hotel with a modern restaurant & a tapas bar, plus a terrace & Thai massages.
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Noam נועם Jacoby","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUM9eRbTGMgq0fT5Izl99ua8jaUD5P9xJX3yaQ245wWKTzi1AHEqg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This was my third visit to Only YOU Boutique, which is a testament to how much I love this hotel.

The room was impressively spacious and kept to an excellent standard of cleanliness. The service remains consistently professional and friendly, making me feel welcome every time I return.

Location:
You couldn't ask for a better spot. It’s located in a vibrant, lively neighborhood surrounded by fantastic restaurants. Plus, having major Metro and bus lines just a few steps away makes exploring the city effortless.

Breakfast Highlights:
The breakfast is a standout—a huge variety of everything from premium cold cuts and cheeses to their delicious ham croissants.
Pro tip: Skip the Nespresso machine in the dining room and ask the kitchen for a coffee; it’s excellent. They also prepare eggs to order exactly how you like them.

Things to Note:
The shower was good, though perhaps not "excellent" compared to the rest of the high standards. One important detail for light-sensitive sleepers: I stayed in a Deluxe Room overlooking the internal courtyard, and the shower window doesn't have a blackout option. There is a persistent outside light (24/7) that filters into the bedroom, which I found a bit bothersome.

I’ll definitely be back!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBYuryevDK-0Y4iwQE5ta_L&fid=0x0:0x1f199920dfadfb10"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"S R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKSlff8du2Fzhc9Y81Ej13Y3lbtd4wKxomeoZ3DZrDuao5IjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent location for our one night stopover. A uniquely designed hotel. I wish they had a handheld bidet but otherwise it was really good. Our room, while relatively large, did not have any outdoor facing windows. This  did not bother me but might be an issue for others so you might want to be careful about which room you book. Staff were nice and professional. This area is meant for walkers, it is not ideal for those who prefer car transport (other than to/from the hotel).","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD9jyT2LdmQhodPWamBg3md&fid=0x0:0x1f199920dfadfb10"],"When":"2026-2-13"},{"Name":"mieketau","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/local-reviews/AJMZ0QftlnsLB8VReEIa8q3x-FUIWL9jAVnw9OiPzFml0xLx7k1DporKgZdMXGALflbNzntF3w=s120-c-br100","Rating":0,"Description":"We stayed at Only You for two nights this last weekend. We came to Madrid for a birthday and surprisingly all the birthday events were organised near this hotel. Meaning the hotel is in a great location! With the best restaurants and bars around (Charúa, Merci, Garbo’s, etc). We stayed in the Deluxe room (118 - with the blue wall), small room but great for only 2 nights and not much luggage. The bathroom was great. The room was far from the elevator and we didn’t hear a sound. The windows and doors are super sound proof! We asked for a late checkout and there was no problem at all. I asked for a pillow menu and I could choose a pillow that’s better for my neck. Amazing service! Breakfast was great, and they have a Thai massage Salon (which we didn’t try, because they were fully booked). Would recommend this hotel if you’re in Madrid for fun, service and location is amazing. Thank you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"URI GOUSMAN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWk1Wc4gHIx2svC3jakge5txglftiw5mVO6R1uVhkIILD972TSASg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An amazing total experience.

It has great facilities and a sort of 24/7 breakfast, which is very helpful at times. The bar is great and hosts live music in the evenings.
There is a Thai room for massages and other treatments and a small but nice gym.

I would like to mention Vagner and Ivan from the reception, the two lovely bellboys whose names I do not know, and the charming Daniela from the restaurant, who always received us with a big smile and helped wherever she could. Thank you!

title: Hotel "Casa el Viso"
address: C. de Oquendo, 14B, Chamartín, 28006 Madrid
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nurman Abdirashitov","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlQOZhi2ba5qo5HFPPgtq3YHnxHygl3H_I2TTCkLkwg6SphWSGtA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They're scammers. I didn't believe the reviews at first, but it's really terrible. I booked a room a month ago, and today, when I'm only a week away, my reservation is being canceled.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Иван","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJLi8R2ueZWjf9XkA7a0fvsPswjGjmg91mmGV5XmOrmPfYmmRNU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We slept in a bathroom.
We stayed at this “hotel” for 4 nights — and it was one of the worst travel experiences we've ever had.

Problems started even before we arrived. After booking, we saw a growing number of concerning reviews saying the place didn’t exist, people couldn’t get in, there was no water, and nobody was answering the phone. I messaged the property, and they reassured me everything was fine and that they would open in April. But when I followed up with more specific questions — they ignored my message completely.

One day before arrival, I contacted Booking.com support, explained the situation, and they reached out to the hotel. The hotel confirmed the reservation to Booking.com, but once again didn’t send me anything directly.

On the day of check-in, we found the place — but the door was locked with a code lock. We knocked for a long time. Eventually, a woman (apparently a cleaner) opened the door and told us we couldn’t check in before 3:00 PM and that we should’ve received a code via message. Of course, we hadn’t received anything. There is no reception, and the only people working there are Spanish-speaking cleaners who don’t speak English.

We left and came back at 2:30 PM. It had started raining. The cleaners kindly let us wait inside the corridor (thank you for that). Still no message. We asked again why we hadn’t received anything — they were surprised and said, “That’s strange, the code is usually sent to everyone.” I tried calling the property — no answer on one number, and the other was simply turned off. Finally, the cleaners managed to contact the owner themselves, and only then did we receive the code. This whole situation was extremely stressful and completely avoidable.

Now the room itself — and this is where things go from bad to absurd.
The room is literally a bathroom with a bed inside. It’s so small that two people can’t even move around freely. The floor is tiled and freezing cold. The toilet is right next to the bed, separated only by a thin glass door — not soundproof, not airtight. Probably designed to “strengthen the bond” between couples by forcing them to hear and smell each other.
The room is extremely humid, especially after using the shower. Cold drafts come through the window, so we ended up sleeping with our heads at the foot of the bed.
There is no soundproofing — you can hear everything from the hallway.
The bed is terribly uncomfortable — we both had back pain after every night.
There are no amenities: no dishes, no hairdryer (unless you ask the cleaners), and the towels are tiny, barely enough to dry your face.
Nobody came to clean the room, change towels, or replace the bed linens. We had to take the trash out ourselves.

Here’s a list of things that were advertised but NOT available:

1. Dining area, seating area — There is no place to sit, at all.

2. Hairdryer — Only available if you ask the cleaners.

3. Kitchen — There is no kitchen. Just a storage area. The fridge was unplugged, and there was no kettle, no microwave, no stove, no dishwasher — nothing. We received some dishes only after explicitly asking for them.
Also, this “kitchen” is closed after the cleaners leave, so it’s not accessible at all in the evenings.

4. 15 m² of space — This room is maybe 8 m² at best.

5. Reception — Doesn’t exist.

6. Work desk — Not present.

7. Kettle, microwave, fridge — None of these were available or working.

Bottom line:
We literally slept in what felt like a badly converted bathroom. Stressful check-in, no communication, zero comfort. I absolutely do not recommend this place to anyone.

We reported all of these issues to Booking.com support, and they partially refunded us for the stay.
Also, be aware: this property appears to operate under another name/account — Casa el Viso and Boutique Hotel Oquendo. Be careful when booking.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMConfe06wE&fid=0x0:0x91f7f5710976a512"],"When":"2025-4-19"},{"Name":"Jennifer Brizuela FS","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvDdPmA52u2J7UnAYQI5shCIJtoui9pEtGSASwf_c4JK4e6ok=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"This is a worst hoter during summer vacation in madrid cause the owner already knows that its super warm but he does nothing at all. NO AIRCON AND  THE LEAST EXPECTED IS FAN BUT NOTHING AT ALL.... i expected to have a good sleep cause i have a meeting the next morning but didnt even rest at all for the poor ventilation.

It says in the site and also posted that no smoking but theres a lot guest that smokes and as a non smoker i value that to be done. "AS I OPEN THE WINDOW  ALREADY SMELL THAT SOMEONE IS SMOKING".

NEVER AGAIN..","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuel Kanales","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJuHFlDxtMGX9fVGH6iSVeMKT4TR-Q8HfdIaHC6_HtkSlgsiA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Mi experiencia en Hotel Casa El Viso ha sido muy negativa.
Los cuartos de baño están en el sótano, lo que implica que si necesitas ir al baño de madrugada tienes que bajar dos plantas por escaleras, algo totalmente incómodo y poco práctico. Además, la insonorización es prácticamente inexistente: se escucha absolutamente todo de las habitaciones contiguas, lo que hace imposible descansar con tranquilidad.
El primer día no hicieron la cama ni cambiaron las toallas, algo básico en cualquier alojamiento. Y lo peor fue el olor del cuarto de baño: un olor muy fuerte y desagradable a tuberías, realmente repugnante.
Lo único positivo fue que la habitación era calentita y contaba con un buen televisor, pero sinceramente no compensa los numerosos inconvenientes.

They have a 24-hour reception which is always good. Safety is great as the door can be only opened by the staff.
When I arrived through booking(dot)com I paid for my entire stay. The next day I received an email from booking saying that my card was declined and that my whole stay was cancelled. This obviously was not true. I told the reception and they pretended to investigate. The truth is that they only did it so that they don’t need to pay any comission to booking which is borderline stuff. Obviously I can’t leave a review on booking so I’m doing it here! I am giving 3/5 stars just for this very unusual practice. I was able to stay at the hotel no problem but it is unusual and again borderline not entirely ethical.
Yes, there is noise on the street but it is outside their control so I don’t blame the hotel. The doors on the hotel rooms do not isolate any sound at all. There was work going on so obviously the noise was as if it were in my room. There were people practising guitar at night in one of the other rooms and you hear everything going on in the neighbouring rooms or in the hallway so don’t expect to get good sleep.
Location: great
Bathrooms: very good and very clean
Wi-fi: good enough
Air conditioning: decent but probably isn’t cleaned properly regularly so you will get an upper respiratory system infection afterwards like I did.
Beds were so so and I recommend you get a room with the bigger beds as the singles aren’t that comfortable.
There is an elevator so you can easily move your luggage and store it later which is good.
Overall for the price you are getting a normal hotel stay. If your priority is good sleep and being undisturbed at night go elsewhere.
If you booked via Booking get ready for the possibility that you won’t be able to leave a review like I did.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jeannidalia Grullón","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUAPCCfvRs8QH6r2ZHftPaMV08xE0szNvv-KNf6SA5zffyTn8Vblw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It is a very appropriate hotel, in price / benefit terms. Although the exterior appearance is not elegant or beautiful, once you enter the reception, everything changes. The room is perfectly clean, it has everything it takes for a comfortable stay. The receptionists are the best of all ... welcoming, practical and helpful. It was the best option I could choose, for my stay for 6 nights. It is 10 minutes from the English Court and C79 Building, a business building with conference and meeting rooms. I strongly recommend it for business trips or for an exploration trip. I could stay there when I return to Madrid. Although they do not serve breakfast, and the coffee machine at the reception did not work, it has a grocery store, right next door and some breakfast options and restaurants in the area.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Joel Rogauskas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKH5cXkvcmLqziQwBUPeA6NasQhYUFnyIv7x92x8AfcDF2K4U=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quiet affordable hostal in a low-key area of the city (Quatro Caminos), within 45 minutes by metro of Barajas Airport. Located in the Chamberí district, this cinema specialises in showing original version films with subtitles, which is a real treat for cinema enthusiasts. The atmosphere is relaxed and welcoming, quite different from the typical multiplex experience. The screens may be smaller, but the quality is excellent, and the seats are comfortable. I particularly appreciate their carefully curated programme of independent and art-house films. The staff are knowledgeable and passionate about cinema. The ticket prices are very reasonable for central Madrid. It's a lovely spot for anyone who wants to enjoy quality films in their original language.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Benjamin Eg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXdvuhpybsr5HUT5xosEciNsCpupXrkfHEFhaFjJfwBvtjmUXc8iQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"A really really cool and retro cinema. [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cinesa Proyecciones offers a fantastic cinema experience in the Cham berí neighbourhood. I've visited several times and each visit has been thoroughly enjoyable. The screens are large with crystal-clear picture quality, and the sound system is superb. The seating is comfortable with ample legroom, which is particularly appreciated during longer films. The staff are professional and courteous, always willing to help with any queries. The location on Calle de Fuencarral makes it extremely accessible by public transport. They show a good variety of films, from mainstream blockbusters to original language versions. The booking system online is straightforward, and the prices are reasonable for central Madrid. Overall, it's a brilliant choice for a cinema outing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ara'","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWsCVLjq994slV5EvKNWDJIa9i_woW7_9f4VMEPML8lwO7ORiUB8g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It is a very good cinema. [{"Name":"KP G","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2Rg9DiQ29ajhUkI-XwqOIh23_chg3Bw9nylChO9JBI-09zvil=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fabulous small cinema, showing good variety of films, including charming older films (Like Cinema Paradiso).

When I was there in January 2026, the showings were 17h (5pm) or later, weekends only.

Theater is small but comfortable. Felt like a speakeasy, due to location. You walk down a small path to get to the entrance, at the side of an apartment building.

Blink and you’ll miss the path to the entrance. Look for the sign with movie schedules at the head of the path/sidewalk.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBsxAXkk7GhjnB9mwaDbmBR&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2026-1-21"},{"Name":"Geoff Marshall (Geoff M)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFsK-oHNx3harVywAojKLdP8J_WuhShUkfvh5MjRtcZyvhonk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Small intimate film theatre, don't expect the usual hollywood schlock of tacky blockbusters and popcorn. This is for discerning movie goers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kevin Peakin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXvUv6jHNsihS8YLYBW2zfuvgWlhnm_pH_TmLXvUAODdMddAjU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great experience nice staff","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Duvalié Carbajal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKSnmtWKgW0YvE-p0gKiH-ZpnyXiz8GWO49xmF-4olTtOk1fKq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Great!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ana Conda","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIhui12yu5U-fbOqmaRme1twKx0_XGHnwSLOyABr0h3lv73Zg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Una maravilla de Cine Estudio  con  una magnífica programación, un sitio intimista para cinéfilos. Ayer estuve viendo "The Chronology of Water". El personal de la Sala encantador. Lo recomiendo totalmente.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC9-HJGf0lddm6xVsDnYgOH&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2026-2-15"},{"Name":"Juanjo Castro","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWw4z226uLeYvTHnPaNG6_E7msO5biqdhVyQb-hiRkl336OwaM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Va a hacer un año de los pases de 7291 en esta sala.

El Pequeño Cine Estudio ha tenido conmigo un comportamiento como exhibidor que dista mucho de la ética y de lo legal. Tal como hice público en su momento, continuó proyectando mi documental 7291 sin mi consentimiento y, aparte, se negó a pagarme la cantidad de taquilla que me correspondía.

Al ser imposible percibir este pago con las condiciones acordadas, presenté una demanda en el juzgado. El hecho de ser un profesional independiente, que no necesita tratar con ellos inevitablemente en el futuro, me ha permitido denunciarlos sin temor a represalias empresariales.

Finalmente, y ante la perspectiva evidente de que iban a perder el juicio (y por tanto, de que deberían pagar los gastos derivados de este procedimiento), el Pequeño Cine Estudio se ha avenido a saldar la deuda.

La vida es justa de vez en cuando. Y en este caso lo ha sido: los dueños del Pequeño Cine Estudio han tratado de quedarse con un dinero que no les pertenecía utilizando unas maneras soberbias y arrogantes, y se han enrocado en su postura durante mucho tiempo porque se consideraban impunes.

Estoy feliz y aliviado por ello.

Al Pequeño Cine Estudio no lo hace pequeño su nombre sino sus dueños.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"juan carlos hurtado delgado","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWby7_BNwEkzVljJUVi9duEDACxlejWzxhGP5-PSuRagtmhKI3AIg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Después de casi 40 años , volví a entrar en éste Pequeño reducto de Buen Cine.
Además con un Clásico de Elvis.
Creo que es la primera vez, que veo a Elvis en Cine.

Muy bien, además con el peludo y mi amigo Grandes Seguidores del Rey.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDY7iSzkodPBIaNv6ALd2IS&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2025-7-29"},{"Name":"CASTRI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjU-rDL6C6F-tsTQEqBsDOpAnS6mVIPnEo7LaqXI3bJ6sqglM_6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sitio fantástico para disfrutar del cine. Una sala de "las de antes" que aguanta el paso del tiempo. Hubo una época que los cine estudios como Groucho, Fantasio, Falla, Los Angeles o Regio, hacían de Madrid un encuentro cultural para el cine absolutamente diferente al circuito de estrenos, con programaciones especiales, mejores precios, sesiones triples y películas diferentes. Cuidemos el Pequeño Cinestudio y disfrutemos de su sala porque es "El último de Filipinas".","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID346GKsQE&fid=0x0:0x8827f3323d8e608a"],"When":"2024-11-18"}]

[{"Name":"chen levy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL0QgD_gqTlXwKtBpxuK407GKy3lqZEDZXO6CULgXQaOd1WKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A cool VIP cinema with a warm and cozy viewing experience — it truly feels like watching a movie at home 🎬
Super comfortable armchairs, a relaxed atmosphere, and kind, attentive waiters who make the experience even better.
Perfect for a fun, pampering movie night. Highly recommended! 🍿✨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCgzNsTG7JnNA_GWKyO6qK0&fid=0x0:0x86ef21c474b2f305"],"When":"2026-1-8"},{"Name":"Rainer Sebus","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJi6TkIePwKambaOwGyHkYGDn6wdDxMz8LVd33IqYGg9ivfqQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great cinema y exceptional experience

We like this cinema, comfortable seats, luxury menue and in cinema service.

But today I’ve made a very special experience:
I forgot my wallet during the last movie. Not only they found it, they shared they phone number and whatsapp and informed me!
But not only they did all possible to hep me - the content of my wallet was complete and nothing was missing!

Thank you to the whole team for saving me and for being so incredible reliable, honest and friendly! You are an example!

Best experience ever!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chris Noble-Beeck","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWFNyIuz4uLoClMLsJ2-CMtxYIiGSeiXqzAiwnE8hhQroQ2w18IOA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"This was my inaugural experience viewing "Avatar 3" in a Spanish-subtitled theatrical presentation and first time at the lux super theatre. The cinema's entrance presented a remarkably clean, aesthetically pleasing, and sophisticated ambiance. However, upon entering the theater, I noted the restroom facilities were singularly located at the rear of the premises, necessitating a considerable walk from the main viewing areas.

I appreciated the convenience of in-seat food ordering. Regrettably, the burger I ordered, despite requesting it medium-rare, arrived significantly undercooked. Furthermore, although I had arranged to receive my crepe after my meal and subsequently utilized the service button to request it, it was not delivered until near the conclusion of the film.

A significant discomfort throughout the screening was the excessively warm temperature within the theater. It felt akin to a sauna, suggesting either a lack of air conditioning or its operation in a heating capacity. This, combined with the faux leather seating, resulted in considerable discomfort for patrons. I strongly recommend activating the air conditioning and potentially offering blankets to those who may find the temperature too cool, as the room was uncomfortably hot by the end of the 3.5-hour film, including advertisements.

The staff, however, were consistently kind and polite, which is the sole reason for the two-star rating. Aside from the commendable service, the menu and food quality were unsatisfactory.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Howard W","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXwehXjkfqD3sZjAAgJUj7akN1KRtboTR08co9cNaRjeu3AlaU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"The cinema is great. The chairs are super comfortable - but really not worth ordering food. Snacks like pop-corn and drinks they deliver fine. But having visited quite a few times, I have learned that hot food either arrives cold, incomplete, or not at all. Just save your money and enjoy the reclining seat and marvellous view.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jessie Kuo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV029-cvNrenk_yGJ___J8pMQxTr6zK6Y8Zk7KyvoUDT8K9uJsP=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Loved my experience here—so worth the extra money for an upgraded movie night! Saw Babygirl with friends, and the seats were incredibly comfortable. The bathroom was surprisingly nice and not like other cinemas. We're gonna be coming here more now.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCC8gDFzS0DcyoL3Kd8lvNP&fid=0x0:0x52ac0d63ee3e76f6"],"When":"2025-12-9"},{"Name":"Lynn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7cpi0MyQtOU7XQM_iygyNg67ZSSGrVeaYasNW-h6w0pmRxCYS=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"This cinema has been one of my favourite in Madrid for so many reasons including how warm and welcoming the owner is to the patrons. Unfortunately, after the renovation of the cinema the new staff hired does not seem to show the same level customer service standards - they are cold and unwelcoming like the man with the earring and the female staff that is so quick to turn the lights on as soon as the credits start to roll. that it deserves if services returns to the level before the renovation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anna P.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7WcsQL-_YjeB8ikBAzP5P--Xr9uZHDVblH8z78yaEZTujZulB-A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I love this new cinema. [{"Name":"JMatos","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUoqlVEjs7EL0Ypcxub1L2t2jf-dh9lnZfiuzZinDiYSlVGhYDDfw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"It’s ok, but the staff are not always welcoming nor helpful. They seem they don’t like their job, so they don’t care to treat people kindly. Furthermore, I presented a request to lower the volume that was too loud, sometimes reaching 89db or even 97db! How come the staff simply do nothing to sort out a problem like this! There were at least 5 children watching the movie under this so UNHEALTHY ENVIRONMENT!!! Yes, because being exposed to such an UNHEALTHY situation for about 2 hours will bring hearing loss certainly. No doubt about that! And it gets worse, because 25 minutes later the employee I had talked to him before simply did nothing! And when I approached him again to say that I was leaving the screening room because I couldn’t stand that TOO LOUD VOLUME anymore , he only said: “I thought they have already sorted out. Do you wanna write a complaint?” and he and his peer just laughed. Unbelievable! As I say to my folks: don’t go to this awkward cinema, because it’ll not be worth it. If you have other options, pick the other options and avoid this one.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICHtIajwQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Etienne Maricq","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjYkr1lsQz_EAW1VKP7X6ZU_hf2k9m0r66YrT3MF7BR3nnEe8n=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Took me several intents to register in the Cinesa iOS app that looks like it could get stability improvements.  The cinema facilities are ok, with subsidized underground parking and a few choices in the food court. It’s main merit is the range of original versión movies. Saw The Mule by Clint Eastwood in VO of course and the theatre was packed
Sound quality is ok, the elevators though are a little slow and too few of them","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID4_9ugsQE&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2019-3-9"},{"Name":"Desirée Zhang","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW1eBPC4O0m3niQE-hQ5-sMZKzE5QkmH4sEagZqR1dGU6nbCvNh=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I used a 35% coupon from LIDL!
I found out from the APP that there are promotional activities for LIDL after registration. You can enjoy a 35% discount when watching movies. The operation is very simple. Copy the discount code, then click the link below to select the cinema. Remember to paste your coupon as the price will change. After checking out and receiving the electronic QR code, you can go directly to the cinema to enjoy it!
The cola and popcorn are really huge. I simply can't finish them all!
I suggest not filling it up so full. It might spill out, especially if it falls into the elevator, which is very dangerous","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDiz-uq6M2RZJX3t684QwH_&fid=0x0:0x5bf6cfa71a49f45c"],"When":"2025-7-1"},{"Name":"Alexander Belochkin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHmUeAN5MO1lsv1FCF3_NmtiMje8muM_JQtnxEQ-aTRyEpYmq7=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"What a poor experience we had.. It’s hard to believe but we were waiting for additional 20 minutes watching various advertisements (cars, butter etc 😵‍💫) before movie finally started. It made 25 minutes in total as we came 5 min before the indicated beginning time. The other people seemed more experienced and were coming later causing a lot of discomfort though.
It would have been better if XL sala could impress but it didn’t.
Lastly, paying almost 6 euros for parking (discount included) made it all even worse 😑","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iago Ciotkowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnEx-HO0nppATgfphy-4LhcT10B29x-fHDxyus1kaYr6IaWA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Very big cinema. Nearly all of the films can also be watched in original version, which makes it one of the best cinemas in the area if that's what you're looking for","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"David F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3glxRQgn9URltFrFYk9DK_gG1cvnnHaOf9k_Il-iDho5mEVVbMg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Films in English/VSOE, great👍 but Accessibility Dangerous 💀⚠️. Escalators ↗️go up but only one small lift🛗 to go down for hundreds of people and an interminable wait 😡 If you are elderly🧑‍🦯 or physically impaired, 80+ concrete stairs await you in a badly illuminated stairwell⚠️
❌MANAGEMENT: THIS IS UNACCEPTABLE in the 21st century!❌
Pay for car park on level - minus 1  but I couldn't reach level - minus 2 by stairs as door was locked from one stairwell.⛔🆘 ♨️ MANAGEMENT :YOU NEED A NEW EFFICIENT ELEVATOR!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Víctor TP","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWjXJe97L0aE_8bIs9VlL0vbReVvdVjh5W9q8Kpj7eacLhdoq6IWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"It's good to spot places where watching movies is not so expensive (around 4 euros less than the Spanish dubbed versions). So if you manage to understand other languages or your reading is fast, I highly recommend you to try the original version movies here. I saw a German movie, it was less than 7 euros. Totally worthy! 🍿","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jean Francois Forgeot d'Arc","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIlUx-OaCiAidPUIRf6Rydxc14XuxMV-fQ52fzfRo0CLRxygEuM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Large screens and greater choices of movies. Having said this, extremely difficult to park in the area, huge queues for buying drinks or popcorn. But most importantly, people are not prevented to enter the movie projection room after it starts... 20 min after movie begins, 7 people were entering and bothering everyone...Not a customer and quality focus, they make business by volume....","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Marina Pamies","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW3eM6y2aXQklPDTWx7IbxzLOG-tPyEFPDSKr4ZpP_WfKUFenFM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"No sitting at all pre screening, staff a bit rude. No food allowed, cinema experience a bit disappointing","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S. Sofie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJmS3fbRGPLspRB41d73L72-gJbmR4p9IoyIHzlA9LgX9h1VA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went here on a Wednesday night to watch “The Apprentice” and were delightfully surprised that the tickets were only 5,9€ - only to find out later (as we literally wanted to come back the day after!!!) it’s only a Wednesday offer.

So guys! Pro tip! Go watch a movie here next Wednesday!

This small cinema is a great place to go. Had a very cool old school authentic feel to it, with the vermillion colored movie screening hall. It’s definitely not one of your modern go-to cinemas with a wide election of blockbusters and quick carbs in the form of ice cold colas and buttery popcorn.

This cinema is like a delightful breath of fresh air. It shows a cool variety of non blockbusters and caters to a more narrow audience. Many movies with original sound (and spanish subtitles) making it possible for travelers like me to relish and enjoy in the newest movies.

The bottom floor was under renovation - in the middle of being painted, it seemed - but the bathrooms were clean and had a slight Hollywood golden era look to them. Super cool and very on-theme.

Would definitely come back!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ALEN HADZIC","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZLhpy68A607EPSL4j-KE2wSgaDPbbJ_nZ8RrUUMSMEz4LEBtb=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I had a fantastic time at Cine Renoir. The theater was comfortable, and the sound and picture quality were excellent. The staff was friendly and accommodating, making sure everyone had a great movie-watching experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Louis “Worldtraveller”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIZjehkFguiS7B7_8wBiJh7hNIOxOhQKLuFv8WJyJ3Krk_F99g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cheap tickets on Mondays and Wednesdays and one of the few cinemas in Madrid where you can see VO (subtitled original versions). Very good films and not the umpteenth Hollywood blockbuster.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Mr Ap","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHX2sALtzUP3GcsuG8guwDmWQKByigZryaxlHTG52vR_eAc-I=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"They don’t have popcorn","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ignacio Azpurua","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_kMQuOQLt_cYiDqFykSE0elFYmoyX4zPs5gOIisEnO-UJsTDu=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"There is no popcorn or sweets store and can't bring out side food.

Watched a cool movie
Popcorn here is suprisingly good have to say","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Summer A.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkStxgtyPwdVIJ1k6zDUe9ZikrcD65XzzmzgOE4A98xhEtpMT3xw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"No food or drinks allowed. user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Nicolas Laur","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0ZS0KPANkEdinPBm0_M7Manax8_2BPecYEyUaogx0ighK7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"First cinema experience in Spain..
Do your best to avoid aisle seats and make sure other people sit next to you to block out the much too bright blue aisle lights.

Biggest issue is sound, room 11 speakers saturated a lot, quite underwhelming. By that I mean not for loud explosions but most dialogue scenes :/

Movie theaters in general and this one as well let in late people; so you'll be bothered 10 min into the movie by flashlights and/or wake up.

Other than that you feel it's quite a movie lovers theater, cool vintage posters, old cameras exhibitions and nice staff members :)

On a sidenote I was pleasantly surprised by spanish audience, little to no talking and no phones out during the movie. (Although lots of popcorn everywhere and coke cans left on seats at the end despite the bins front and back)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDsVJO-6p68WCKgPa9rQk6z&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Teena B T","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjURct3MXzRWZQvvv4bcBnVzzpzVnP-bVsmdWVfJysdIwD7q526c=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Small but pretty decent cinema and for a 5 euro ticket, the movie I watched was fantastic so I guess it was worth it. I would happily overlook the theatre size and other factors and will definitely return for more good films if the prices are so generous. However, two stars because something I really didn’t like was the lack of empathy from the man at the ticket counter when I was struggling to communicate with him in English. He made no effort at all, just shaking his head sideways vigorously , expressing his irritation at everything, which I thought was extremely small minded.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Dominik Sakowski","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOKnGAGn98grVcMkOll5kubfeDXEfHVN2ov767BPX9S5-Ead8l5w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I’ve been to better movie theaters in third-world countries. Renoir Princesa’s layout is such that if someone (as long as they're not short) sits in the seat in front of you, their head blocks part of your view of the movie. I’ll also add that these seats are average in comfort, and you’ll have about as much legroom as you would on some economy-class airplane seats. The speakers are comparable to a TV’s built-in speakers—you can get better and more immersive sound quality at home with a simple soundbar-and-subwoofer setup. The screen size is mediocre; I’ve been to backyard movie nights with friends that had larger screens for outdoor projector setups. On top of all this, don’t expect much if you decide to use the restroom during your visit: stall doors without functional locks, non-working hand dryers… a true embarrassment in the center of Spain’s capital city.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0VFy_lveSJ2b8wCKy3HjqqyCms0hIPvFYFQIKkUX451INv2t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"I expected a bigger place and got disappointed because the rooms were very long so when you're around the last rows, you feel very far and it can get hard to see. Also moving around can be difficult because there is no middle path to go through.
But beside the layout of the room itself, their staff are adorable and the price is okay to see a movie.
Be aware that they propose the movie in their native language.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"kanga ranga","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuk-irHZ7FRIC9zNAlU4zwhO6Vd0Z8i8a3YEVZ_YjNIkuPAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"One of the few cinemas in Madrid that screen movies without being dubbed to Spanish, however the roomas are too dark, so dark that impossible to look for your seat!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Victoria P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWnw78gTcOZvaF-oDF0sa--B2IkBLKHpMILldogmNXuM2x-V3nr=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"location is great, close to Plaza de España, but that's where the positives end. the way seats were located in our room was questionable since they didn't go up by rows, they all were on the same level. and the screen is small so in row 9 i could only see the heads of people in front of me. the sound was too loud, and the room was cold, which made the whole experience uncomfortable. popcorn wasn't good :( buuuut the movie was good, if you haven't seen The Batman with Robert Pattinson yet, i recommend!! and it was on my birthday so i still enjoyed my time there a lot","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDWvfuklwE&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2022-4-1"},{"Name":"Patrick Giroud","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIYFhtjplYq1GSbXFBV0ipvV7O0UWj04x89cMqx0x2Wd2_plA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"It's was more like a Garage than a cinema. The staff was very pissd and lat me that know. The Price by the shop was cheap i paid for 3water 0.5l 4.50€. Ticket price was 9.20€","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICE1uC4CA&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2017-9-17"},{"Name":"Gabrielle Mathy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLL1LWH1lxa8sW0SFZQ4EAgbv8ts4RwUlPOXW6iATsw_2BPng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"I used to come here to see movies in English but haven't been in several years. They have updated the screen and seating along with the general decor making the whole place so much better than before!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb-8Wa-wE&fid=0x0:0xfa4287b428cbd451"],"When":"2024-8-9"}]

[{"Name":"Aiden","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXYSm6zhd-CSRY3AoywB7scR56leCbUQQQr5oyKv8bSm_p1xNxgQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The cinema is high quality with convenient online or in-person booking. They offer original-language showings of most movies, which is a big plus. Although both the snacks and tickets are a little expensive, the prices seem to be pretty typical for most modern cinemas. They often have custom popcorn buckets/merch for the 'big' showings, which is always appreciated (even if the buckets are ~€30).

I have purchased their TooGoodToGo bag, and was pleasantly surprised by what I received (from what I remember, it included a hot dog, popcorn, soda, and a candy bar) for the price.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD8u1d-Vopv_SkItO9YQGHf&fid=0x0:0xae6550e1ef47da01"],"When":"2025-12-15"},{"Name":"Emilia Rabat","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcPxwQsHlZsVpo8Z4Su6P9qMsolpO1wtZUxUbefPlpZL9gUq9r0w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The location of the cinema is unbeatable. It is a good cinema with a good disposition of the necessary elements for the acquisition not only of the tickets but of the snaks and soft drinks. As well as the tickets for it.
I like that there are rooms near the bathrooms, in other cinemas they are far away.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDKbGHsiCX91XHC5XhjiKMM&fid=0x0:0xae6550e1ef47da01"],"When":"2025-9-23"},{"Name":"Chetan Bhanwal","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUR3ES8hZ3n2CRUnSdxWuX5ZAsxsh2TT8Z0x2ap2TQXs8O-yf_Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is where you get a great quality experience, nice one to enjoy movies here in Madrid","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Grace Wong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWcQw1fbg5VdoBEXBZcuDDlZPhx-3_Tw-mAyAyTZ4Oh578NXAjt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"A must to go and enjoy movies with your popcorn in Prinsipe Pio mall/station #Cinesa
The theatre/cinema area is wide enough for everybody and has a very clean comfort room ...","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDBwPDF_gE&fid=0x0:0xae6550e1ef47da01"],"When":"2023-1-9"},{"Name":"Ali Gordon","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW_wWfIWPtqJQhu-HRfbAMAkaKFGsWc_18oZHp779h0EDPaUflWsw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"For people with limited mobility the distances between the entrances and ticket office, screens and toilets were so large it was a little painful for me to walk everywhere!

Experienced "Isens" for the first time and and it was quite impressive. El precio es muy económico y te da la posibilidad de ver películas que ya no están en cartel, por ejemplo, lar nominadas a los Goya del año anterior.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juan Antonio Quintas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX5tTAQ7mqvYCgHPO5NEqIxDPx8ec1vV1KpGo1RackVY7U55A8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Lamentable sala de cine 🎞️. Hay que hacerse un ovillo para sobrevivir a la proyección, dado que el espacio entre butacas mínimo, para afeitarse o cortarse💈las piernas.
De los empleados de la taquilla sólo decir que ignorante alguno, al decir que la película había empezado ayer (Mi amiga Eva) y no era así, hasta pude elegir asiento con luz.
Muy triste que la #academiadecine haya premiado al barrio pijo de #moncloa para su sala. Nada céntrico, by the way.
Olvidaba meter la pulla final: incomodísimos los asientos. Mejor que la película dure menos de 90'.
Y de los baños ya mejor 🤐.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Aury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVEIVbbZDNE5Gulwyqp_mLp_hg-01i2PryDZDkiTdsgju_x-0Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba7-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Last November 14, 2025 my friends and I went to this venue to Los Morancos show. The facilities are in good conditions as well as the sounds. We are in the 2nd floor and we heard the whole show very well.
Los Morancos Bis a Bis show was awesome. We're not from Spain and always wanted to see Los Morancos
performance.
It is a prison comedy in which the Cadaval brothers end up in jail due to a new law restricting humor, called the "Mustard Law." Inside prison, they must adapt to a hostile environment while their characters, such as Omaita and Antonia, try to devise a plan to free them, which only worsens the situation and generates humorous moments, current events parodies, and musical numbers. We laughed a lot and enjoyed the comedy as well as the songs. We had a really fun time.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCh21rcDuq9DOJYjJC8NMeu&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-11-30"},{"Name":"Esther","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVw0VFy_lveSJ2b8wCKy3HjqqyCms0hIPvFYFQIKkUX451INv2t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Layout of the rooms were weird; I had to go down 2 floors to get to the bathroom + it's not very accessible for persons with reduced mobility, lots of stairs.

Beside this, the space was good, seats were comfy + good quality of sound.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCSqJGlyDsQUrfQt6eJgKLU&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-6-14"},{"Name":"AO “Fine diner”","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJq0oEfngTFbaKzFs5xOZA_M5RsXKiWEyxBJnQt5mAy9g_bXQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Well located, small enough to have a good view. They don’t have escalators and there are only 2 bathrooms in one floor, hence there’s a big line to get in, they should fix that asap.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw2eC6mQE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2025-3-26"},{"Name":"Kyriakos Cy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV6sIcixwmQACY1Nmt-MKX9-fjeKs-eHJGIye4AgW5cQm9bs9uJWA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Capitol Building in Madrid, also known as Edificio Carrión, is an iconic landmark located on Gran Vía. Famous for its distinctive curved facade and the Schweppes neon sign, it exemplifies 1930s Art Deco architecture. The building houses a cinema, shops, and offices, and its rooftop offers stunning views of Gran Vía and the surrounding area. The Capitol Building is a must-see for architecture enthusiasts and those exploring the vibrant heart of Madrid.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICL69SSkgE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2024-6-23"},{"Name":"Kevin Blackledge","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUYxfgscLO_WNesnd0rdOv_T07aJRB0wZV8Pk3_SQhJ0H4p5WrHLw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"We went to see the ballet at this place,  the ballet was the Nutcracker and was excellent,  but finding the place seemed a little difficult.  I would give it 5 stars however because of the lack the information given caused us to run across town I'm taking a star off. There was no indication that the nutcracker was even being performed at this venue.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC1uNzWkwE&fid=0x0:0xbcb7415d51079e00"],"When":"2023-12-22"},{"Name":"Andre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ8HeBZkxvHh3pYAuHftZiTl7T06cWYIQH_z2bAHh38U6uMV5M=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Went there to see a music concert. Staff was very disturbing during the full concert, always running after anyone filming or taking a picture as if people were about to commit a murder. Very disturbing to anyone trying to enjoy the music. I of course understand there are rules, but the theater management does not need to overdo it and make things worse than what they are.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Dorman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLvXB5GQs1HAsnCTD9_NvOuuH04lU3W491OKJEpjnbxqwDKtw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Comfy seats. 2° outside and quite chilly inside too. Toilets are in the basement so quite a way away from main arena. The stage was also too small for the ballet we went to see but enjoyable nonetheless. We didn't use the bar, Starbucks is right across the road so avoided the queue by having a coffee pre show in there.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"ngọc phong nguyễn","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW5F3DIESpoUSb-xY89e8QJLX0OMVNjYMeQDEqj_9CS5j3onDs=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Honestly amazing flavor.","Images":null,"When":""}]
