user_reviews: [{"Name":"Jhon Kensington","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUZU1YBDENQnvtQt2VLmO7r20vZwz3n5xYys4noMhqedoHQ_Ak=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cine Callao is an absolutely brilliant cinema located right in the heart of Madrid. The building itself is a stunning piece of architecture from 1926, and stepping inside feels like travelling back in time whilst still enjoying modern cinema facilities. The auditoriums are spacious and comfortable, with excellent sound systems and properly large screens. What particularly impressed me was how well they've maintained the original character of the venue whilst incorporating contemporary technology. The staff are friendly and efficient, and the location on Plaza del Callao couldn't be more convenient. Whether you're watching the latest blockbuster or catching a special screening, this cinema offers a truly memorable experience that combines historical charm with top-notch entertainment.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anthony Muhye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX0RqoZ5Hojo1nBp8kg8Jri6OlNezhBOtKY77dmZBbxNadE3R3t=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This review isn't about the cinema experience itself, but about an interesting hack related to the cinema. Movies arriving in Spain are regularly premiered here, meaning that every few weeks between Weds-Sat, you'll have the opportunity to see some of the biggest celebrities worldwide. Don't believe me? Look at the photos I'm adding below 😊","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile\u0026image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICBtKWqugE\u0026fid=0x0:0xe0c8b0bec4693207"],"When":"2022-12-18"},{"Name":"Eddy Semaan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZ8Z2_z0M89uIY-GPtjgzG79x5HzzEkIHAYIwa8NFOfFi3LFEL6w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Cool cinema located in the center of Madrid. Gracias por hacernos disfrutar del aprendizaje.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDVHVJ_Wt5ZHu6GREi1j7U9&fid=0x0:0x795f440ef4356af7"],"When":"2026-1-27"},{"Name":"norton bombey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKifgUFh3MDl4FWkDlHLpgOIpUhvZUpJOIiyAukbVE1pk6flM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Metrópolis es una escuela maravillosa. Hice un año de teatro y varios cursos de guion y dibujo y no puedo estar más contento con la experiencia, me ha venido genial y he podido conocer gente extraordinaria dentro del mundo del teatro, en especial la fantasticosa y dulce Paulaner, que me alegraba muchísimo el día cuando me dejaba sus gafas sexys. A pesar de que solo me metí en interpretación por la experiencia desde el principio me han ayudaron un montón a adaptarme y a sentirme uno más. Es una pequeña gran familia donde siempre tienes la sensación de cercanía y de estar arropado en las buenas y en las malas. Buena relación calidad precio, totalmente recomendado si queréis expandir vuestras artes, abarcan un porrón de ellas.
Muchas gracias por todo 😘","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Manuela Paso","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKHSBlqF-sQ5Jd_A_K838SvaccfAalFEpvO-MjK6kfbPdt8-w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Como actriz profesional con muchos años de experiencia puedo decir que METRÓPOLIS  me  parece una escuela estupenda y seria para empezar a formarte que es como yo la conocí hace ya 30 años. Conocimiento, experiencia y sabiduría a raudales.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDnzLq_dQ&fid=0x0:0x795f440ef4356af7"],"When":"2024-10-3"},{"Name":"Jose","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXPL3zx7tb1RI-N7qnNMRw1VI5u0aOYx0KmOWA8bWe4GsH7_cFZ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Estudio primero de cine y tv en Metrópolis. It's actually quite tucked away, which surprisingly adds to its charm. This movie theater is an absolute must-see for all lovers of the Seventh Art.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD28WIQmUJ5SpSIbTCnXeKC&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2025-11-9"},{"Name":"Monica Taneja","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKfaoaqidbSFeMXC2Vp7B9BF6U4KV_suubNbG4K8BlrQidGrg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Must do for cinephiles in Madrid! Showing a mix of old spanish or American movies. American movies are shown in english with spanish subtitles. Tickets are currently free, but you have to go to the box office 2 hours before showtime to get your ticket and they will sell out. Timeliness is very important and they don't let it late comers.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Iva Opacic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKWqpiH_An96Xz8XjuBV86i_AsYU6Hq-aEkdF4AA6rPCAYbeg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Really special cinema. We liked watching old movie in old cinema. No food or drinks allowed inside. Box office opens 17:00 h. I think it is 3e for entering. We saw a movie for free I think because it was a film festival. 2/3 of tickets they sell online 1/3 is left for box office.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDw8Oj_Kw&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2025-3-22"},{"Name":"Vivian Rizo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKC3FQZLEytRYI4vw8hGLdUjs8FQlqwZOLceoZdOzMWXUWe0A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"beautiful theater. there are ongoing renovations right now (oct 25) so the tickets are free! check online calendar to see which movies are playing. cafe is temporarily closed. ticket office is on the right side and is open at 17:00 tuesday to sunday. there’s a bookshop next door. arrive 10-15 minutes early. the temporary entrance is at the door on the left side of the butcher shop. no late entry!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Samuel Viñolo Locuviche","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVYUTiOdFMcVSx6iiu8NCB-0zV_lgfHyCTcAwKWAnuOZXK_GFqSyQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Cine Doré, the oldest cinema in Spain, is a beautiful venue with two screening spaces and a cosy cafeteria, which hosts all kinds of films -old and modern- and film seasons at very affordable prices. Tickets can be purchased online (up to 5 days before the screening) or before the screening (they always keep 1/3 of the tickets for sale on the spot). Sometimes the screenings also include a presentation or a talk with some members of the film crew after the screening. Foreign language screenings (non-Spanish) are always shown in O.V. with Spanish subtitles.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD3bnt0AE&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2024-4-13"},{"Name":"duckula","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLU4kGEu5HaYhUn84EL2J4lbEpuOzyAj8wjnZKsCOlFVICB8-E=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the box office to get your tickets from 16:15 onwards. Located at the side of the building along the street. Check schedule on their website but tickets can only be purchased on site here.

👉 Attached pic of box office window. On the right where the guy is standing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID0-5SX4AE&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2019-10-26"},{"Name":"Bruce Taylor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW7ZwHZwFAz7oGQiiCRnTeGw1mE0t4nGp5ZiI-jZsBc8uTP2D5i=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Update 2024: We went for the first time to a film (Neil Young´s Heart of Gold) on the open air terrace at 22.00. A great experience.

2023: Hadn´t been for a long time. Great cinema showing classics on big screen in Sala 1. Beatifully renovated with films in VOSE original with Spanish subtitles. Also great value.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICrvuCEKw&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2024-7-7"},{"Name":"Pedro Nogueira","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU3KtjzYDy7zOyqvrxcHWoCSJPF2abNqn0pWekF-a4oFXGUf2eN=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"More than worth it and for only 2,5 euros or free, depending on the screening. Beautiful place inside and outside.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDUnJLiVA&fid=0x0:0x19c0f490421bfff4"],"When":"2019-8-16"}]
